metrics.name: ToF Conversion Rate (21-Day) (All Products) (RBO use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

LEFT JOIN app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis mmk
    ON  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = mmk.MERCHANT_TOKEN

WHERE SQ_TOF_EVENT IS NOT NULL 
AND SQ_TOF_CONVERSION_DATE <= r.EVENT_DATE  + 21

SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP 
  
 FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r
 JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    
WHERE HAS_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST = TRUE

metrics.name: BoF Conversion Rate (7-Day) (All Products) (RBO use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

LEFT JOIN app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis mmk
    ON  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = mmk.MERCHANT_TOKEN

WHERE HAS_SQ_BOF = TRUE 
AND SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_DATE <= r.EVENT_DATE  + 7

SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP 
  
 FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r
 
JOIN (SELECT 
        MERCHANT_TOKEN
        ,SUM(CHARGEBACK_CENTS/100) AS TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS 
    FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
    JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
        ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
        AND IS_UNIT = 1
    GROUP BY ALL) cb
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = cb.MERCHANT_TOKEN
        
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE (r.IS_FA = 1 OR fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)
AND TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS > 0

SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP 
  ,TOTAL_LOSS AS VALUE 

FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r
  
JOIN (SELECT 
        MERCHANT_TOKEN
        ,SUM(LOSS_CENTS/100) AS TOTAL_LOSS
    FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
    JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
        ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
        AND IS_UNIT = 1
    GROUP BY ALL) cb
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = cb.MERCHANT_TOKEN
        
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE (r.IS_FA = 1 OR fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)

SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(r.EVENT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

INNER JOIN APP_SUPPORT.APP_SUPPORT.CASES t1
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN

INNER JOIN APP_SUPPORT.APP_SUPPORT.DIM_EMPLOYEES t2
    ON  t1.AGENT_ID = t2.SALESFORCE_ID
    AND t2.WORKDAY_ORGANIZATION = 'Seller - Global Customer Success'

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t3
    ON  t3.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t3.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.CASE_CREATED_AT BETWEEN r.EVENT_DATE AND r.EVENT_DATE + 30

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

INNER JOIN (SELECT
                MERCHANT_TOKEN
                ,SUM(TOTAL_TIMES_FROZEN) AS FREEZES 
            FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER 
            WHERE IS_UNIT =1
            GROUP BY 1) du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND FREEZES > 0

WHERE 1=1
    AND pe.product_name = 'Square Online Store'

select
  merchant_summary.merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.signup_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
inner join app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
        on revenue_summary.merchant_token = merchant_summary.merchant_token
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date  + 35
      and merchant_summary.onboarding_tof_channel in ('app', 'web', 'retail') 
group by all

metrics.name: NVA | BoF (1% Capped)
metrics.description:
Net Volume Added: net volume added (NVA) is the first year adjusted Total GPV in first year from Square BoF date into the Square ecosystem and is used to evaluate new to Square efforts. NVA is a predictive metric that has an additional variance/error which is not included in the current error band and p value. Incorrect conclusion could be produced without including the additional variance/error. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for more information.

NVA = Predicted GPV365

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , sq_bof_conversion_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(BOF_NVA_USD, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d BoF NVA (avt)
metrics.description: Total NVA at AVT level for first 7d BoF in the experiment

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_NVA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_NVA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NVA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_NVA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NVA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NVA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d BoF 35d GPV w/ 2% cap (avt)
metrics.description: Joins at AVT level, only works for optimizely experiments

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_BOF_GPV35D_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_GPV_35_DAY_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NVA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    JOIN APP_MKTG_INTL.INTL_PROD.MERCHANT_ENGAGEMENT ME
    ON ME.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP <= ME.SIGNUP_AT -- exclude post signup AVTs (existing audience)
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_GPV_35_DAY_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NVA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_BOF_GPV35D_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 91d ToF Rate
metrics.description:
ToF rate within first 91d of exposure

Source table: APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
     , K.SQ_TOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
FROM APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
--WHERE K.SQ_TOF_CONVERSION_AT BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
    du.merchant_token
    , u_recorded_at AS timestamp
  FROM eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction cfi
  INNER JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.user_token = CASE WHEN cfi.subject_unit_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_unit_token -- these tokens are sporadically empty string
      WHEN cfi.subject_user_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_user_token
      ELSE cfi.subject_merchant_token
    END
  WHERE cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_feature_name = 'Items Inventory Export'
    --AND try_parse_json(cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_details)['filtersUsed'] IS NOT NULL --partial export used
    AND u_recorded_at BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
    du.merchant_token
    , u_recorded_at AS timestamp
    , 1 as value
  FROM eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction cfi
  INNER JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.user_token = CASE WHEN cfi.subject_unit_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_unit_token -- these tokens are sporadically empty string
      WHEN cfi.subject_user_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_user_token
      ELSE cfi.subject_merchant_token
    END
  WHERE cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_feature_name = 'Items Inventory Export'
    --AND try_parse_json(cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_details)['filtersUsed'] IS NOT NULL --partial export used
    AND u_recorded_at BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
  origin_user.id as user_id,
  origin_ts as timestamp,
  1 as value
FROM
  tidal_silver.search.search_search_selectitem_v1
where
  make_date(ingest_year, ingest_month, ingest_day) >= "2024-11-07"
  and origin_payload_filter_type_enabled = "ARTISTS"
  and (
    origin_payload_query_uuid is not null
    or origin_payload_query_uuid != ""
  )
  and (origin_client.platform in ("android", "web", "desktop") or (origin_client.platform in ("iOS") and left(origin_client.version, 5) >= 2.139))

metrics.name: Avg Total Session Time (across all pages)

### Definition

Total actual time spent on PW pages during the session, determined using heartbeat events.

Source table is [`app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_experience_summary `](https://square.zeroheight.com/5e5d4fe59/p/40cce3-public-web-experiencesummary/b/10236e)

metrics.name: Contact Sales Clicks on US Homepage
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link`](https://square-console.sqprod.co/cdp/production/dictionary/events/event-variant/869?srch.txt=click+link). 

### Query Logic
* the link must contain as part of the url `us/en/sales/contact`
* click must occur during the test
* includes variations of the home page, including some experiment specific URLs. **Note, if the experiment requires a specific URL, it should be added to the query.**

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  anonymous_id as avt
  , timestamp
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
  and (properties_link_url like '%/us/en/sales/contact%')
  and (
         context_page_path = '/us/en' 
    )

metrics.name: Signup clicks on US Homepage
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link`](https://square-console.sqprod.co/cdp/production/dictionary/events/event-variant/869?srch.txt=click+link). 

### Query Logic
* the link must contain as part of the url `signup`
* click must occur during the test
* includes variations of the home page, including some experiment specific URLs. **Note, if the experiment requires a specific URL, it should be added to the query.**

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    AND (properties_link_url LIKE '%signup%')
 and (context_page_path = '/us/en' 
)

  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a47e5?v=restaurant',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a47e5?v=retail',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a47e5?v=beauty',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/q9xf2?v=retail',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a3hb8?v=retail',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/q9xf2?v=restaurant',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a3hb8?v=restaurant',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/q9xf2?v=beauty',
  'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a3hb8?v=beauty'

select
  tof.merchant_token

where tof.conversion_type = 'product_tof'

SELECT
    t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  , t1.TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_DASHBOARD.SELLER_DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home Billboard'
    AND t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home AI Bar'
    AND (t1.PROPERTIES_COMPONENT_NAME ILIKE ANY('widgets -%', 'key metrics', 'quick actions')

        )

metrics.name: Lead Form Submission
metrics.description:
- source table: `app_marketing.public.vfact_lead_submission_conversion_events`
- timestamp: `entry_point_at`
- filter: `entry_point_source = 'activity_fill_out_form'`

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  avt 
  , MIN(lead_submission_at) AS timestamp
FROM app_marketing.public.vfact_lead_submission_conversion_events
WHERE form_fill_flag = 'Y'
  AND lead_submission_type = 'Public Web'
GROUP BY avt

select
  square_decisions.avt
  , square_decisions.timestamp
from app_measurement.adhoc.square_decisions_flattened_avt as square_decisions
inner join martech_data.identity_graph.map_avt_ivt_deterministic AS map 
        on square_decisions.avt = map.anonymous_visitor_token
inner join customer_data.onboard.merchant_create_account as merchant_creation
        on map.identified_visitor_token = merchant_creation.entity_id
where square_decisions.experiment_id = '{{ experimentId }}'
  and not square_decisions.is_holdback
qualify rank() over (partition by map.anonymous_visitor_token order by map.first_seen desc) = 1

metrics.name: Payment Verification (IDV) Completion Rate (21-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 21

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Payment Verification (IDV) Completion Rate (14-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 14
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 14

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: BoF Conversion Rate (Hardware Products) (21-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME IN ('R12', 'R4', 'S3', 'R6', 'X2', 'T3', 'R41', 'T2', 'R42', 'S3 Mount', 'S3 Kiosk', 'S1')
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 21    

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Hardware Device Setup Rate (21-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,DATE(t1.CREATED_AT) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM DEVICE_SETTINGS.DEVICE_SETTINGS_PRODUCTION_AURORA_001__DEVICE_SETTINGS_PRODUCTION.DEVICE_CREDENTIALS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.CREATED_AT) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 21

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Stateful Hardware Adoption Setup Guide Task Start Rate (7-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.TIMESTAMP) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 7
    AND t1.PROPERTIES_ACTION_ITEM = 'click_setup_guide_task'
    AND t1.PROPERTIES_SUB_ACTION_ITEM = 'STATEFUL_HARDWARE_ADOPTION'
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.HDM.FACT_SHOP_LINE_ITEM t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    REGEXP_LIKE(t1.PRODUCT_READER_TYPE, 'R6|R4.*|R12|S.*|T2|X2', 'i')
    AND DATE(t1.CREATED_DATE) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 21    

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.HDM.FACT_SHOP_LINE_ITEM t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    REGEXP_LIKE(t1.PRODUCT_READER_TYPE, 'R6|R4.*|R12|S.*|T2|X2', 'i')
    AND DATE(t1.CREATED_DATE) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 30

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  avt as avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp,
FROM
  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_webpage_scroll_engagement_event
WHERE 1=1
  and scroll_depth >= 25
  and u_recorded_at BETWEEN  '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
  and webpage_path = '/us/en/payments'

metrics.name: GPV (Top 2% Values Capped at 98% Percentile Value) (2024+)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.GPV_GROSS_FXD_USD) AS VALUE

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_PROCESSING_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.REPORT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: R4x Device First Payment Events (All devices)

metrics.name: GPV (63D) | Top 1% Values Capped at 99th Percentile

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT merchant_token,
dateadd(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp, -- account for timestamp delay
volume_gross_fxd_usd as value
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary
 WHERE product_category = 'Processing'

SELECT
  event_key AS event_key
, event_timestamp AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking
WHERE experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND should_be_queued = 1
    AND disqualified != 1

SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    --AND properties_link_text ilike '%Get Started%'

  avt
  , u_recorded_at as timestamp

        '/us/en',

  avt as avt,

WHERE 1=1
  and scroll_depth >= 25
  and u_recorded_at BETWEEN  '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
    tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
  , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'

FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_START_SESSION t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE

MERCHANT_TOKEN 
, SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS timestamp
FROM APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS
WHERE SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
adop.merchant_token
, MIN(adop.event_date) timestamp
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption_category adop
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT vdm
ON adop.merchant_token = vdm.merchant_token
WHERE 1=1
AND SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
AND adop.event_date between merchant_created_at_date and merchant_created_at_date + 14
group by 1

SELECT
        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , CASE WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = False
               THEN 35.0 + 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) 
               WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = True
               THEN 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id)
                END as value
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss
     ON pss.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', pss.run_sent_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', pels.first_payrun_sent_at)
GROUP BY 1,2

    , event_date AS timestamp
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.adoption_events
WHERE 1=1
    AND product_name = 'Square for Restaurants'
    AND product_category = 'SaaS'

        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , CASE WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = False
               THEN 35.0 + 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id)

sql.conversionSQL:

        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) as value 
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss

metrics.name: Total Listening Time (iOS + Android)
metrics.description: Total listening time on Android & iOS the first 7 days after being exposed to an experiment

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  userId as user_id,
  startTimestamp as timestamp,
  streamDuration as value
from
  tidal_gold.gold_table.fct_streaming
where
  year = '2023'
  and month >= 10

  kpis.merchant_token
  , sq_bof_conversion_at AS timestamp
FROM app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT merchant_token 
  FROM app_hardware.hdm.vfact_transactions_daily 
  WHERE payment_date >= '{{ startDate }}' AND NOT (reader_type_family IN ('CNP', 'MCR'))
  ) t
  ON t.merchant_token = kpis.merchant_token
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}' 
  AND TO_DATE(kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at) >= '{{ startDate }}'

metrics.name: GPV | All Experiment Users (0.3% Outliers Capped)
metrics.description:
Gross Payment Volume. The total amount of money that moves through Square's system over a given period.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/GPV)

### Notes
* the signup timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups.signup_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  kpis.merchant_token
  , signup.signup_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(gpv_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signup
        on kpis.merchant_token = signup.merchant_token
where kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at <= '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT 
  DISTINCT 
    userId           AS user_id, 
    firstPaidStartTs AS timestamp,
    subscriptionType as dimension
FROM tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user_intraday
WHERE 
  previousSubscriptionCohort = 'TRIAL' -- Was on trial
  AND subscriptionCohort = 'PAID'      -- Now is paying
  AND trialDays = 30                   -- Num of premium trial days used
  AND totalTimesAsATrialUser = 1       -- Ensure the person is not a re-trialer. This shouldn't happen, but have seen a few cases
  AND subscriptionType in ("PREMIUM", "PREMIUM_PLUS")
  AND totalTimesAsAChurnedUser = 0
  AND hasBeenAChurnedUser = False
  AND isChurnedUser = False
  AND totalTimesAsAPaidUser = 1
--   AND latestChurnedStartTs >= current_date() - 30

SELECT 
  DISTINCT 
    userId           AS user_id, 
    firstPaidStartTs AS timestamp
FROM tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user_intraday
WHERE 
  previousSubscriptionCohort = 'TRIAL' -- Was on trial
  AND subscriptionCohort = 'PAID'      -- Now is paying
  AND trialDays = 30                   -- Num of premium trial days used
  AND totalTimesAsATrialUser = 1       -- Ensure the person is not a re-trialer. This shouldn't happen, but have seen a few cases
  AND subscriptionType = "PREMIUM"
  AND partnerid = 1
  AND isTestCampaign = False
  AND isOnDiscountCampaign = False
  AND isOnPremiumAccessCampaign = False
  AND isUserFromPartner = False

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with 2+ BoF Conversions (AR-Generating Products) (30-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH BOFS_PER_MERCHANT AS

(
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t1.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t1.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
  
GROUP BY ALL
)

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.TIMESTAMP

FROM BOFS_PER_MERCHANT t1

WHERE VALUE >= 2

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with Positive AR35 Amount (Banking)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.REPORT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS AR35
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY = 'Banking'
    AND t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL

HAVING AR35 > 0

metrics.name: SQ Processing BoF Conversion Rate (45D) | Signup

sql.conversionSQL:
//Sq BoF (excl. DA)
SELECT DISTINCT
kpi.merchant_token
, SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT timestamp
FROM app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis kpi
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT vdm
ON kpi.merchant_token = vdm.merchant_token
WHERE 1=1
AND SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT IS NOT NULL
AND sq_bof_event = 'first_transaction'
AND SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
AND SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT between merchant_created_at_date and merchant_created_at_date + 45
and is_currently_deactivated = 0

SELECT 
adop.merchant_token
, MIN(adop.event_date) timestamp
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption_category adop
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT vdm
ON adop.merchant_token = vdm.merchant_token
WHERE 1=1
AND product_category = 'Processing'

select entity_id as merchant_token

from customer_data.onboard.merchant_click_support_link

and entity_id IN

     ob.entity_id

SELECT
  t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_START_SESSION t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2

GROUP BY ALL

  , properties_order_number AS cart_id

UNION ALL

SELECT

  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_checkoutv3_completing_order_error_payment

metrics.name: First Payment
metrics.description:
First payment is when a seller processes their first payment via any Square product including Register POS, Register Terminal, Virtual Terminal and Invoices.

[BoF by product | go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/bi/Product+Events)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  bof.merchant_token,
  min(bof.conversion_ts) as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.vfact_unified_attribution as bof
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signups
        on bof.merchant_token = signups.merchant_token
where bof.conversion_type = 'product_bof'
  and bof.conversion_product_name not in ('T2', 'X2')
  and conversion_event = 'first_payment'
group by bof.merchant_token

metrics.name: GPV 37-Day
metrics.description:
Gross Payment Volume. The total amount of money that moves through Square's system over a given period.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/GPV)

metrics.name: [GTMI] 14d R12 HW Purchase
metrics.description:
R12 hardware purchase, including both web and retail channels

Sourced from app_hardware marketing ROIS table. ** note because ROIS table only has purchase date timestamp, it's adjusted forward 1 day to avoid the timestamp falling behind the experiment exposure if on same day

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
     -- hw purchase date is date only (so technically prior midnight)
     -- therefore use next bd to avoid timestamp falling before web visit
     , DATEADD('day', 1, BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS
WHERE READER_TYPE = 'R12'
  AND BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT ssp_token
    , completion_timestamp as timestamp
FROM ops_ds.ops_ds.ssp_user_metrics
WHERE 1 = 1
    AND completion_timestamp IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: NPA / activation - Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation
metrics.description: NPA is a predictive metric that has an additional variance/error which is not included in the current error band and p value. Incorrect conclusion could be produced without including the additional variance/error. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for more information.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token
  , attempt_created_at AS timestamp
  , COALESCE(npa_total, 0) AS value
FROM ops_ds.ops_ds.le_complete_verification_requests
WHERE version_rank_desc = 1
AND decision_product = 'PAYMENTS'
AND payment_activated_at IS NOT NULL

with visit_creation_flow as (
SELECT
distinct entity_id
, first_value (timestamp) over (partition by entity_id order by timestamp asc) AS first_convert
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_PAGE v
WHERE context_page_path like '%/dashboard/invoices/new%' 
  and ((properties_transition_to = 'invoices.new' and properties_Transition_from in ('invoices.invoices_overview.index', 'invoices_all.index') ) )
UNION ALL
select
  entity_id
, first_value (timestamp) over (partition by entity_id order by timestamp asc) AS first_convert
from customer_data.dashboard.merchant_start_new_invoice
where properties_button_location = 'HERO'
) 

select entity_id as merchant_token
    , min(first_convert) as timestamp
from visit_creation_flow
group by 1

where true

SELECT

metrics.name: RTL Number of Times Used Inventory Plus Feature on RTL POS
metrics.description: The actions include 'View Pending Restocks', 'Save Stock Forecast', 'Filter Stock Overview', 'Search Stock Overview', 'Bulk Adjust Stock in POS', 'Transfer Stock'.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token as merchant_token,
  THE_DATE as timestamp,
  USAGE_COUNT_PER_DAY as value
FROM app_retail.public.merchant_feature_usage mfu
JOIN app_retail.public.retail_event_mapping rem
  ON rem.raw_event_key = mfu.raw_event_key
WHERE 1=1
  AND rem.source_application = 'retail-pos'
  AND metadata['is_plus_feature'] = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT
  ss.merchant_token
  , IFF(ss.product_name IN ('Appointments', 'Appointments Plus'),'Appointments',ss.product_name) AS product_name
  , IFF(ss.complete_status IN ('in_trial_trial','in_trial_future_start'),'trial',complete_status) AS status
  , ss.created_at AS timestamp
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vfact_subscription_states_expanded ss
WHERE ss.product_name IN ('Appointments Plus')
  AND ss.complete_status IN ('paying_active')
  AND ss.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT DISTINCT
  fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , fsl.order_number AS cart_id
  , fsl.created_at AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_shop_line_item fsl
WHERE product_reader_type = 'X2'
  AND created_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
  ftd.merchant_token
  , ftd.payment_date AS timestamp
  , ftd.total_adjusted_revenue_usd AS value
FROM app_hardware.hdm.vfact_transactions_daily ftd
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
  ON ftd.fatp_serial = fr.fatp_serial
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr2
  ON ftd.reader_identifier = fr2.reader_identifier
  AND fr2.reader_type_key LIKE 'R4%'
WHERE ftd.payment_date >= '{{ startDate }}' 
  AND NOT (ftd.reader_type_family IN ('MCR', 'CNP'))

metrics.name: Health & Beauty First Paid Subscription Event | All Experiment Users
metrics.description: This measures the % of merchants who had their first SaaS paid conversion event on any Square product within the first 35 days of exposure.

sql.conversionSQL:
select fsse.merchant_token, 
       min(fsse.start_date) as timestamp
from app_bi.hexagon.vfact_subscription_states_expanded fsse
join app_appointments.public.latest_merchant_categorization_predictions mc
    on fsse.merchant_token=mc.merchant_token
where 1=1
and fsse.complete_status='paying_active'

metrics.name: Health & Beauty BoF Event | All Experiment Users

select pe.merchant_token,
       min(pe.event_ts) as timestamp
from app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
join app_appointments.public.latest_merchant_categorization_predictions mc
    on pe.merchant_token=mc.merchant_token

metrics.name: GPV 35-Day | Signups
metrics.description:
Gross Payment Volume. The total amount of money that moves through Square's system over a given period.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/GPV)

### Notes
* the signup timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups.signup_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  kpis.merchant_token
  , signup.signup_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(gpv_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signup
        on kpis.merchant_token = signup.merchant_token
where kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at <= '{{ endDate }}'

select
  merchant_summary.merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.signup_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
inner join app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
        on revenue_summary.merchant_token = merchant_summary.merchant_token
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date  + 35
      and merchant_summary.onboarding_tof_channel in ('sales_closed') 
group by all

metrics.name: BoF Conversion Rate (AR-Generating Products) (40-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 40
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 40
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t1.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t1.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Leads from Vertical vs Business Types dropdown in Top Navigation Links

with clicks as 
(SELECT  anonymous_id as avt   , timestamp

where (
properties_link_category = 'Restaurants' or 
properties_link_category = 'Food & Beverage' or

properties_link_category = 'Beauty' or
properties_link_category = 'Health & beauty' or

metrics.name: Stateful Hardware Adoption Setup Guide Task Start Rate (30-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.TIMESTAMP) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND t1.PROPERTIES_ACTION_ITEM = 'click_setup_guide_task'
    AND t1.PROPERTIES_SUB_ACTION_ITEM = 'STATEFUL_HARDWARE_ADOPTION'

metrics.name: % >$0 Net Banking (incl. Capital) Revenue (F30d since created)

sql.conversionSQL:
-- Net Banking revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- first banking trxn
    SUM(drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd) as net_banking_revenue_f30d
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  AND drs.product_category IN ('Banking','Capital')
GROUP BY 1
HAVING net_banking_revenue_f30d > 0

-- Gross processing revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- first processing trxn
    SUM(drs.revenue_gross_fxd_usd) as Gross_processing_revenue_f30d
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  AND drs.product_category = 'Processing'
GROUP BY 1
HAVING gross_processing_revenue_f30d > 0

metrics.name: F15D IDV Completion Rate (P&P)
metrics.description: F15D IDV completion rate that takes into consideration time a seller has entered the P&P experiment

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
, CASE WHEN FIRST_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_APPROVED_AT::DATE = '9999-09-09' THEN NULL 
    ELSE FIRST_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_APPROVED_AT::TIMESTAMP END  AS timestamp
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT

-- gross revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp,

metrics.name: Bounce on Homepage
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview`](https://coda.io/d/go-publicwebhome_dGONvFyOhfa/Page-View-Table_suUpM#_lualS).

A bounce is defined as a pageview that's flagged as both the first and last page in a session; `start_page_flag` and `exit_page_flag` respectively.

### Query Logic
* this metric is filtered on the US version of the homepage; *country field derived from webpage_path if the country is within the url* and all `webpage_path`s in the filter are for the US English version of the homepage
* the Square ToF audience is also filtered to 'Prospect' (see link above for specific definition and exclusions to this field--hint: filter the coda table for `sq_tof_audience`)
* includes variations of the home page, including some experiment specific URLs. **Note, if the experiment requires a specific URL, it should be added to the query.**

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt, 
  u_recorded_at as timestamp
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where sq_tof_audience = 'Prospect'
  and (webpage_path = '/us/en'
    or webpage_path = '/us/en/home/a23d9'
    or webpage_path = '/us/en/home/a47e5'
    or webpage_path = '/us/en/home/a48b9'
    or webpage_path = '/us/en/home/q9xf2'
    or webpage_path = '/us/en/home/a3hb8')
  and exit_page_flag
  and start_page_flag
  and pageview_country = 'US'

metrics.name: High Value Carts Completed (>=$500 or X2)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT DISTINCT
    fo.created_at::DATE AS created_date
    , fo.created_at 
    , fo.completed_at::DATE AS completed_date
    , fo.completed_at AS timestamp
    , fo.sq_avt AS avt
    , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
    , COALESCE(ROUND(fo.total * NULLIF(ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0), 2) , 0) AS cart_total_usd
    , CASE
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL AND sku.reader_type IN ('Stand') THEN 'S1'
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(sku.reader_type)
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NULL AND pk.product_key IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(pk.reader_type)
        WHEN v.sku ILIKE '%kit%' THEN 'Kit'
        WHEN third.sku IS NOT NULL THEN '3PP'
        ELSE NULL
      END::VARCHAR AS product_reader_type
    , CASE
        WHEN fo.sq_shared = 1 THEN 'shared_cart'
        ELSE 'ecomm'
      END AS order_type
    , fo.sq_internal
  FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders fo
  INNER JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_line_items AS li
    ON li.order_id = fo.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users 
    ON users.id = fo.user_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_addresses AS address ON address.id = fo.ship_address_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_states AS geo_state ON geo_state.id = address.state_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_stores AS store ON fo.store_id = store.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_variants AS v
    ON v.id = li.variant_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_products AS p
    ON p.id = v.product_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_adjustments AS adj
    ON adj.order_id = fo.id
    AND adj.adjustable_id = li.id
    AND adj.label ILIKE 'Promotion%'
    AND adj.eligible = 'TRUE'
    AND adj.finalized = 'TRUE'
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.third_party_periph_sku_to_product_map AS third
    ON third.sku = v.sku
    AND third.row_num = 1
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.dim_hardware_sku AS sku
    ON sku.sku = v.sku
  LEFT JOIN fivetran.app_hardware_staging.reader_type_from_product_key AS pk
    ON pk.product_key = p.sq_product_key
  LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON COALESCE(created_date,completed_date) = ex.exchange_rate_date
    AND fo.currency = ex.from_currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD' 
  WHERE 1=1
    AND fo.sq_rejected_at IS NULL
    AND fo.number NOT ILIKE '%WR%'
    AND p.name NOT ILIKE '%rma%'
    AND fo.created_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
    AND fo.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
    AND fo.completed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND order_type <> 'shared_cart'
    AND fo.sq_internal != TRUE
    AND (cart_total_usd >= 500 OR COALESCE(product_reader_type,'na') = 'X2')

metrics.name: FP Flagged Transfer Request Merchants w/ Checking Activity 7 days Post Risk Action

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH fp_units AS (
    SELECT
        tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
      , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
    FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
    INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
    ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
    LEFT OUTER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units fau
    ON tr.unit_context_token = fau.unit_token
    WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
        AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
        AND cc.disqualified != 1
        AND fau.unit_token IS NULL
    GROUP BY tr.unit_context_token
)

SELECT
    fu.unit_token
  , fu.timestamp
  , CASE
    WHEN count(ca.unit_token) > 0 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
    END AS post_risk_activity
FROM fp_units fu
LEFT OUTER JOIN app_banking.app_banking_analytics.checking_activities ca
ON fu.unit_token = ca.unit_token
    AND dateadd(day, 7, fu.timestamp)::date <= ca.created_at::date
    AND ca.activity_state = 'SETTLED' -- only count settled activities
GROUP BY fu.unit_token
       , fu.timestamp
HAVING post_risk_activity = 1

   ('Click Kit Card Customize - customize', 'Click Product Action Card - add_to_cart_modal_open')) 
   OR
   (properties_event_description IN ('Click Kit Card Buy Now - buy_now') AND properties_additional_parameters_kit_first_party_product = 'r12d')
   )

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_ADOPTION_CATEGORY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY = 'Processing'
    AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'processed_fifth_transaction'

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_completing_order_error_general
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT 
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt

  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_checkoutv3_completing_order_error_delivery
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_view_checkout_step
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND properties_step IN ('Review Order - General Error'
                         , 'CheckoutV3 - Completing General Error'
                         , 'Payment - Payment Create Error'
                         , 'Payment - General Error'
                         )
UNION ALL
SELECT
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.anonymous_visitor_view_checkout_step
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND properties_step IN ('Review Order - General Error'
                         , 'CheckoutV3 - Completing General Error'
                         , 'Payment - Payment Create Error'
                         , 'Payment - General Error'
                         )

metrics.name: AR 7-Day | Signups
metrics.description:
Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 7Day for all signups during the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the signup timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups.signup_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_summary.merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.signup_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
inner join app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
        on revenue_summary.merchant_token = merchant_summary.merchant_token
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date  + 7
group by all

metrics.description:

inner join app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
        on revenue_summary.merchant_token = merchant_summary.merchant_token
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date  + 21
group by all

metrics.name: NPA | ToF Conversions - Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation
metrics.description: Net Profit Added: net profit added (NPA) is the first year adjusted revenue from acquisition into the Square ecosystem and is used to evaluate new to Square efforts. NPA is a predictive metric that has an additional variance/error which is not included in the current error band and p value. Incorrect conclusion could be produced without including the additional variance/error. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for more information.

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , sq_tof_conversion_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(total_npa_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

metrics.name: Clicks on Bottom Line Pages
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link`](https://square-console.sqprod.co/cdp/production/dictionary/events/event-variant/869?srch.txt=click+link). 

### Query Logic
* the link must contain as part of the url `us/en/sales/contact`
* click must occur during the test
* includes variations of the home page, including some experiment specific URLs. **Note, if the experiment requires a specific URL, it should be added to the query.**

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  anonymous_id as avt
  , timestamp
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
  and (properties_link_url like '%bottom-line%')
  and (
         context_page_path = '/us/en' 
    )

select visitor_id,
   timestamp
from OPTIMIZELY_SHARE.PUBLIC.SQUARE_CONVERSIONS
    , lateral flatten(input => experiments) a
WHERE  event_name in (  '8447815042_square_register__buy_now_cta_clicks'
    , '8447815042_square_register__contact_sales_cta_clicks'
    , '20870240956')

select
   context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
   , timestamp
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where
  context_page_path in ('/us/en/point-of-sale/restaurants/future-needs')
  and properties_link_parent_id not like 'modal%'
  and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
  avt as avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp,
FROM
  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_webpage_scroll_engagement_event
WHERE 1=1
  and scroll_depth >= 25
  and u_recorded_at BETWEEN  '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
  and webpage_path = '/us/en/campaign/take-payments-1'

SELECT
  avt as avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp,
  time_on_page as value
FROM
  APP_MKTG_WEB.attribution.public_web_pageview

WHERE 
 (
            webpage_path = '/us/en/campaign/take-payments-1'
          )
  
    and u_recorded_at BETWEEN  '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

select
  context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
  , timestamp
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where properties_link_url ilike 'https://squareup.com/shop%'
  and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT
    du.merchant_token
    , MIN(u_recorded_at) AS timestamp
  FROM eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction cfi
  INNER JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.user_token = CASE WHEN cfi.subject_unit_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_unit_token -- these tokens are sporadically empty string
      WHEN cfi.subject_user_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_user_token
      ELSE cfi.subject_merchant_token
    END
  WHERE cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_feature_name = 'Items Inventory Export'
    --AND try_parse_json(cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_details)['filtersUsed'] IS NOT NULL --partial export used
    AND u_recorded_at BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND DATEADD(day, 30, '{{ startDate }}')
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

select
  merchant_token
  , sq_bof_conversion_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD_PROCESSING, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

SELECT
attribution.avt
, COUNT(DISTINCT attribution.merchant_token) AS value
, attribution.conversion_ts AS timestamp
FROM app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing AS attribution
WHERE attribution.conversion_type = 'sq_bof'
AND conversion_product_name = 'Capital'
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
attribution.avt
, COUNT(DISTINCT attribution.merchant_token) AS value
, attribution.conversion_ts AS timestamp
FROM app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing AS attribution
WHERE attribution.conversion_type = 'sq_bof'
AND conversion_product_name = 'Square Card'
GROUP BY ALL

select entity_id as merchant_token
    , original_timestamp as timestamp
from customer_data.messenger.merchant_click_subscription_pricing_action
where properties_action_type_name IN ('try_free', 'next', 'upgrade')
and properties_flow_type != 'idv'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d T2/3 HW Purchase
metrics.description:
T2 or T3 hardware purchase, including both web and retail channels

Sourced from app_hardware marketing ROIS table. ** note because ROIS table only has purchase date timestamp, it's adjusted forward 1 day to avoid the timestamp falling behind the experiment exposure if on same day

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
     -- hw purchase date is date only (so technically prior midnight)
     -- therefore use next bd to avoid timestamp falling before web visit
     , DATEADD('day', 1, BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS
WHERE READER_TYPE IN ('T2','T3')
  AND BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: HW Rec Flow - 1P (Non-R4x) Add to Cart

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  cf.entity_id AS merchant_token
  , cf.anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(cf.entity_id,cf.anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , cf.properties_additional_parameters_order_order_number AS cart_id
  , cf.timestamp
  , cf.properties_action_item
  , cf.properties_event_description
  , COALESCE(cf.properties_additional_parameters_product, cf.properties_additional_parameters_kit_first_party_product) AS product
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_click_feature cf
WHERE TRUE
 AND TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
 AND properties_event_description IN 
   ('Click Product Configuration Modal - add_to_cart', 
    'Click Product Action Card - add_to_cart', 
    --'Click Kit Card Buy Now - buy_now', 
    'Click Kit Card - add_to_cart')
 AND product IN ('r12d', 'x2', 't2', 's3b', 's3b-kiosk', 't3a')

metrics.name: Shop Funnel - 1P (Non-R4x) Add to Cart (GP or Shop PDP)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT
  cf.entity_id AS merchant_token
  , cf.anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(cf.entity_id,cf.anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , cf.properties_additional_parameters_order_order_number AS cart_id
  , cf.timestamp
  , LOWER(COALESCE(cf.properties_additional_parameters_product, cf.properties_additional_parameters_kit_first_party_product)) AS product
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_click_feature cf
WHERE TRUE
 AND TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
 AND properties_event_description IN 
   ('Click Product Configuration Modal - add_to_cart', 
    'Click Product Action Card - add_to_cart', 
    'Click Kit Card - add_to_cart')
UNION ALL

SELECT
    hw.subject_merchanttoken AS merchant_token
    , hw.subject_anonymizedusertoken AS avt
    , COALESCE(hw.subject_merchanttoken,hw.subject_anonymizedusertoken) AS visitor_id
    , order_number AS cart_id
    , hw.recorded_at AS timestamp
    , LOWER(COALESCE(reader_type_key,parent_product)) AS product
  FROM app_hardware.adhoc.hw_shop_checkout_cdp_events_base hw
  WHERE TRUE
   AND TO_DATE(recorded_at) >= '{{ startDate }}'
   AND eventname = 'AddProduct'
 )
 WHERE 
   CASE 
      WHEN LOWER(product) LIKE 'r4%' THEN 'r4x'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('r12d', 'r12') THEN 'r12'
      WHEN LOWER(product) LIKE 's3%kiosk' THEN 's3-kiosk'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('s3b', 's3b stand') THEN 's3'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('t2b', 't2') THEN 't2'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('x2b', 'x2') THEN 'x2'
   END IN ('r12', 'x2', 't2', 's3', 's3-kiosk')

SELECT 
  merchant_token
  , merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , event_ts AS timestamp
FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof 
WHERE product_name ILIKE 'Capital'
  AND event_type = 'top_of_funnel'
  AND TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'

metrics.name: Clicks on Ctrl Appointments and Var Beauty Pages
metrics.description:
#### Control:
Clicks on appointments page (when entered from ‘all beauty solutions’)
#### Variant:
Clicks on solutions/beauty page (when entered from ‘all beauty solutions’)

# Note: this metric should only be used for pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test

sql.conversionSQL:
with all_beauty_solutions_clicks as (
  select distinct
    context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
    , timestamp
  from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
  where properties_link_text = 'All beauty solutions'
    and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
)

select distinct
  clicks.context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
  , clicks.timestamp
  , 1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link as clicks
left join all_beauty_solutions_clicks as abs_clicks
       on clicks.context_subject_anonymous_token = abs_clicks.avt
      and timediff(minute, abs_clicks.timestamp, clicks.timestamp) < 60
where ((
        clicks.context_page_path = '/us/en/solutions/beauty'
        and clicks.properties_optly_rendered ilike '%pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test:variation%'
        and abs_clicks.avt is not null
       )
    or (
        clicks.context_page_path = '/us/en/appointments'
        and clicks.properties_optly_rendered ilike '%pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test:control%'
        and abs_clicks.avt is not null
       )
      )
  and clicks.timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

with cte as (
select avt, u_recorded_at as timestamp,
1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage_path = '/us/en/banking/credit-card'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 91d BoF NPA (avt)
metrics.description: Total NPA by AVT for first 91d BoF in the experiment (91d captures majority of BoF for most countries)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_NPA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NPA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NPA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NPA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 14d BoF Rate
metrics.description:
BoF rate in first 14d after exposure to experiment based on merchant token

Source table: APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
     , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
FROM APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
WHERE SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.TIMESTAMP) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_DASHBOARD.SELLER_DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND (t1.PROPERTIES_COMPONENT_NAME ILIKE ANY('widgets -%', 'key metrics', 'quick actions', 'homepage filter') 
          OR t1.properties_feature_name ILIKE '%Dashboard Home%'
        )
    AND t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home Billboard'
    AND t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home AI Bar'
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN,
  MIN(t1.case_created_at) AS TIMESTAMP
FROM
  APP_SUPPORT.APP_SUPPORT.CASES t1
  INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t3 ON t3.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
  AND t3.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE
  CASE_GROUP_NAME ilike('%support%')
GROUP BY
  ALL

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/Full+Funnel+Attribution+Data+Dictionary) The first trial activity of a given merchant across all Square products. The first of the following events:

sql.conversionSQL:
--for Frictionless ONB Q3 experiment
SELECT 
 gem.merchant_token
, converted_at AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,timestamp,converted_at) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.growthbook_experiments_merged_variants gem 
LEFT JOIN app_engage.app_engage_etl.grm_product_events gpe
ON gem.merchant_token = gpe.best_available_merchant_token
    AND gpe.event_name = 'setup_completion_appointments'
    AND product_name = 'Appointments'
    AND gpe.converted_at >= timestamp 
    AND (gpe.converted_at BETWEEN timestamp AND dateadd(day,30,timestamp))
WHERE gem.variation_id IN ('2689872','2692469')

WITH cte AS (

        SELECT
            DISTINCT entity_id
            , timestamp AS the_date
        FROM customer_data.dashboard.merchant_gift_cards_overview__set_up_egift_cards a
    
        UNION
    
        SELECT
            DISTINCT entity_id
            , timestamp AS the_date
        FROM customer_data.dashboard.merchant_configure_egift__get_started
    )

    SELECT
        entity_id AS merchant_token
        , MIN(the_date) AS timestamp
        , 1 AS value
    FROM cte
    GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
    e.merchant_token
    , e.created_at AS timestamp
    , CASE WHEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type IN (9,100,101,105) AND gift_card_type = 'ELECTRONIC' AND TO_CHAR(event_proto) NOT LIKE '%4652414E43484953455F%' AND created_at BETWEEN '2025-01-27' AND '2025-03-11' THEN e.amount_cents/100 END),0)) > 0 THEN 1 END AS value
FROM giftcard.raw_oltp.events e
JOIN customer_data.dashboard.merchant_configure_egift__finish_success c
ON e.merchant_token = c.entity_id
GROUP BY ALL

      merchant_token

  where complete_status IN ('paying_active','paying_in_grace','paying_pending_canceled','paying_pending_paused')
  AND plan_token != 'square-online-free'

SELECT
      merchant_token
      , merchant_token as avt
    , merchant_token as visitor_id
    , DATEADD(second, 86399, DATE_TRUNC('day', MIN(the_date))) AS timestamp
  FROM weebly_analytics.ecom_saas.so_hosting_dimensions_daily sdd
  where complete_status IN ('paying_active')
  GROUP BY 1

select dps.merchant_token as merchant_token
,dps.merchant_token as avt
,dps.merchant_token as visitor_id
,DATEADD(second, 86399, report_date) as timestamp
,sum(adjusted_revenue_var_usd) as value

left join weebly_analytics.online_store.sos_kpi_signups so on dps.merchant_token =so.merchant_token

and sos_signup_at is not null

and so.user_deleted = 0
and dps.product_category = 'Processing'
Group by 1,2,3,4

metrics.name: GPV from merchants who viewed Verticalized Homepage (Restaurant, Retail, Beauty)
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis).

The GPV metric is the 35 day variant defined as *the total amount processed in card payments in USD within 35 days of the merchant's SQ ToF Conversion*. The source for this metric is `app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_processing_summary.gpv_gross_fxd_usd`.

### Query Logic
* the timestamp is the merchant's signup timestamp
* the merchant must have a Square ToF conversion before the end of the test
* merchant's signup timestamp must occur after a pageview of the Verticalized Homepage for Restaurant, Retail, or Beauty.

**Note: denominator is [Page views to Verticalized Homepage (Restaurant, Retail, Beauty)](https://growthbook-app.sqprod.co/metric/met_2cw52ulmax7a22)**

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  kpis.merchant_token
  , signup.signup_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(gpv_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signup
        on kpis.merchant_token = signup.merchant_token
where kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at <= '{{ endDate }}'

  , sl.created_at AS timestamp

from weebly_analytics.online_checkout.soc_links sl
left join weebly_analytics.online_checkout.soc_itemizations soi
  on sl.merchant_token = sl.merchant_token
  and sl.id = soi.computed_link_id
where platform_created in ('dashboard.online_checkout', 'dashboard')

SELECT
  cc.event_key AS event_key
, cc.event_timestamp AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN banklin.raw_oltp.transaction_events te
ON cc.event_key = concat('ST$_MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD_', te.external_system_id)
    AND te.external_system = 'MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD'
    AND te.type = 'DECLINED'
    AND te.octopus_result = 'IN_APP_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED'
    AND te.created_at::date >= (SELECT min(event_timestamp)::date
                                FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking 
                                WHERE experiment = '{{experimentId}}')
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'

    AND cc.disqualified != 1

metrics.name: Any Shop Upfront Paid Order Completed Purchase

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , o.completed_at AS timestamp
  , o.payment_total
  , o.sq_payment_schedule_id
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_payments sp ON sp.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND sq_payment_schedule_id = 1
  AND o.completed_at IS NOT NULL
  AND o.total > 0

metrics.name: Appointments Setup Complete | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
This measures the number of merchants who are "setup complete" within the first 35 days of creating an Appointments account. This means that a merchant:

* Review at least 1 Appointments settings page
     * Web: cancellation policy, business settings, client relations
     * Mobile: customer communications, payments, cancellations
* IDV
* Add a service to their catalog (not an auto-created service)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    best_available_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , MIN(the_date) AS timestamp
FROM app_appointments.public.setup_completion
WHERE setup_rate=1
GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: Good Seller Active Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

JOIN (SELECT merchant_token, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN is_currently_churned = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS not_churned
           FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary  
           WHERE user_type = 'UNIT'
           GROUP BY ALL) AS ls
    ON r.merchant_token = ls.merchant_token 


LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND ls.not_churned = 1

metrics.name: Payment Activation Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP 
  
 FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
 JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    
WHERE HAS_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST = TRUE

metrics.name: Good Seller AR70 (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 70

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: CS Contact Rate (30-Day) (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

INNER JOIN APP_SUPPORT.APP_SUPPORT.CASES t1
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN

INNER JOIN APP_SUPPORT.APP_SUPPORT.DIM_EMPLOYEES t2
    ON  t1.AGENT_ID = t2.SALESFORCE_ID
    AND t2.WORKDAY_ORGANIZATION = 'Seller - Global Customer Success'

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t3
    ON  t3.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.SQUARE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t3.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.CASE_CREATED_AT BETWEEN r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 30

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Good Seller GPV (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(ls.LIFETIME_GPV_AMOUNT_BASE_UNIT_USD/100) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_USER_LIFETIME_SUMMARY ls
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = ls.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND ls.USER_TYPE = 'MERCHANT'
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL 

GROUP BY ALL

The revenue range is also dependent on the location (rev range by geo) and if it is not an existing merchant then it is routed to Salesforce as an MQL.

metrics.name: Bof conversions (37 days)
metrics.description:
Source table: `app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing`

Notes:
* first conversion timestamp for either `sq_bof` or `product_bof`

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , timestamp
from 
(select merchant_token, conversion_product_name, min(conversion_ts) as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing 
where conversion_type in ('sq_bof', 'product_bof')
group by 1,2)

SELECT
  userId as user_id,
  ts as timestamp,

metrics.name: Active time on US Homepage (at least 10 sec)
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview`](https://coda.io/d/go-publicwebhome_dGONvFyOhfa/Page-View-Table_suUpM#_lualS).

This metric is filtered on `webpage_path` which is *a substring of the raw URL, the URL path for the Page View*.

### Query Logic
* **active time on page must be more than 10 seconds**
* includes variations of the home page, including some experiment specific URLs. **Note, if the experiment requires a specific URL, it should be added to the query.**

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp,
  active_time_on_page as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where active_time_on_page >= 10
 and (webpage_path = '/us/en' )

metrics.name: Clicks on the Homepage (at least 1 click)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
 and (
context_page_path = '/us/en'
  )

select session_started_at AS timestamp,
        avt
 from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_experience_summary
 where (avt, to_date(session_started_at)) in (
     select avt, day
      from
     ( select avt,
       to_date(session_started_at) as day,
       count(distinct web_session_key) as count_of_sessions
       from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_experience_summary
       where sq_tof_audience = 'Prospect'
       group by 1,2
       having
       count(distinct web_session_key) > 1 )
      )

metrics.description:
The source table for this metric is [`app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview`](https://coda.io/d/go-publicwebhome_dGONvFyOhfa/Page-View-Table_suUpM#_lualS). 

The webpage is the complete URL path for the Page View. For this metric, we've filtered on URLs that match a verticalized view of the restaurants home page.

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt as avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage in (
    'https://squareup.com/us/en?v=restaurant',
      'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/q9xf2?v=restaurant',
    'https://squareup.com/us/en/home/a3hb8?v=restaurant'
  )

SELECT
  s.utterance_id,
  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_accepted=true
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id
 where mm.medium = 'SMS'

metrics.name: Suggested Replies Eligible to be Shown Rate (Utterance) SMS

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  s.utterance_id,
  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted,
            was_eligible_to_show
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_eligible_to_show=true
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id
 where mm.medium = 'SMS'

SELECT
  s.utterance_id,
  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_shown = True
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id
 where mm.medium = 'SMS'

SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_START_SESSION t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.ENTITY_ID
    AND DATE(t2.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 30

WHERE

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Shop Orders - Completed Finance Order and has SQ BoF

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  --, o.completed_at AS timestamp
  , tof.true_sq_bof_conversion_ts AS timestamp
  , o.payment_total
  , o.sq_payment_schedule_id
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_payments sp ON sp.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.all_tof_merchants tof
  ON tof.merchant_token = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
WHERE o.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND sq_payment_schedule_id = 2
  AND o.completed_at IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: Dashboard Home Usage Rate (14D)
metrics.description: To eliminate the novelty effect, we’ll only analyze click records captured from day 8 onward following the start of each user’s 7-day exposure period.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    t1.ENTITY_ID AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  , t1.TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_DASHBOARD.SELLER_DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.ENTITY_ID
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home Billboard'
    AND t1.properties_feature_name != 'Dashboard Home AI Bar'
    AND (t1.PROPERTIES_COMPONENT_NAME ILIKE ANY('widgets -%', 'key metrics', 'quick actions', 'homepage filter') 
          OR t1.properties_feature_name ILIKE '%Dashboard Home%'
        )
GROUP BY ALL

   , 1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where properties_link_text = 'Learn more'
  and context_page_path IN ('/us/en/hardware')
  and contains(PROPERTIES_LINK_URL,'/us/en/hardware/register')

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Click Through Rate
metrics.description:
#### Control:
Clicks on appointments page (only from sellers who entered from ‘all beauty solutions’) + clicks on solutions/beauty page (when entered from anywhere)
- 60 min time window for clicks on appts page from 'all beauty solutions'
#### Variant:
Clicks on solutions/beauty page (when entered from anywhere)

# Note: this metric should only be used for pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test

sql.conversionSQL:
with control_clicks as (
  select distinct
    context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
    , timestamp
  from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
  where properties_optly_rendered ilike '%pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test:control%'
    and properties_link_text = 'All beauty solutions'
    and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
)

select
  clicks.context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
  , clicks.timestamp
  , 1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link as clicks
left join control_clicks
       on clicks.context_subject_anonymous_token = control_clicks.avt
    --   and timediff(minute, control_clicks.timestamp, clicks.timestamp) < 60
      and control_clicks.timestamp < clicks.timestamp
where ((
        clicks.context_page_path = '/us/en/solutions/beauty'
       )
    or (
        clicks.context_page_path = '/us/en/appointments'
        and clicks.properties_optly_rendered ilike '%pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test:control%'
        and control_clicks.avt is not null
       )
      )
  and clicks.timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

select
  avt
  , u_recorded_at as timestamp
  , 1 as value
from  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview pw 
where webpage_path in ('/us/en')
    and device_type = 'Mobile'
    and u_recorded_at between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

with cte as (
select avt, u_recorded_at as timestamp,
1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage_path = '/us/en'
and device_type = 'Mobile'
and u_recorded_at between '{{startDate}}' and '{{endDate}}'
and next_page like '%/sales/contact%'
)
select avt, timestamp, value
from cte

with cte as (
select avt, u_recorded_at as timestamp,
1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage_path = '/us/en/hardware/register'
and u_recorded_at between '{{startDate}}' and '{{endDate}}'
and next_page is not null
and next_page!= webpage_path
)
select avt, timestamp, value
from cte
