metrics.name: Square POS Time to Onboard Completion (99th Percentile)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
    distinct ca.ENTITY_ID                                   as merchant_token
    , completed_timestamp                                          as timestamp
    , datediff(second, ca.timestamp, completed_timestamp)   as value
    , rank() over(partition by ca.entity_id order by ca.timestamp) as rn 
from customer_data.onboard.merchant_create_account ca 
join (select entity_id as merchant_token
    , min(timestamp) as completed_timestamp
    from customer_data.square_mobile.MERCHANT_VIEW_WELCOME_MODAL
    group by 1) wm 
    on ca.ENTITY_ID = wm.merchant_token
where timestamp >= '2025-05-01'
and coalesce(context_application_name,context_application_application_name,CONTEXT_APP_NAME,CONTEXT_APPLICATION_APP_NAME) in ('register-ios', 'register-android')
and CONTEXT_APPLICATION_IS_SUPER_POS = 'TRUE' 
qualify rn = 1

metrics.name: MQLs (AU)
metrics.description: A merchant identified through form submission or via third-party data enrichment where the merchant indicates a revenue range of greater than $250k. The revenue range is also dependent on the location (rev range by geo) and if it is not an existing merchant then it is routed to Salesforce as an MQL.

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt
  , min(mql_at) as timestamp
from app_marketing.etl.lead_attribution_inbound
where
     country_code = 'AU'
  -- and revenue_range != '$100k - $250k'
  and mql_at >= '{{ startDate }}'
group by avt

SELECT DISTINCT
  ss.merchant_token
  , IFF(ss.product_name IN ('Appointments', 'Appointments Plus'),'Appointments',ss.product_name) AS product_name
  , IFF(ss.complete_status IN ('in_trial_trial','in_trial_future_start'),'trial',complete_status) AS status
  , ss.created_at AS timestamp
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vfact_subscription_states_expanded ss
WHERE ss.product_name IN ('Square for Restaurants', 'Square for Retail', 'Appointments Plus')
  AND ss.complete_status IN ('paying_active')
  AND ss.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_ENGAGE.APP_ENGAGE_ETL.ADOPTION_EVENTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 14
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 14

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
  rev.merchant_token
  , rev.merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp  
  , adjusted_revenue_var_usd AS value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary rev
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.all_tof_merchants bof
  ON bof.merchant_token = rev.merchant_token
  AND DATEDIFF(DAY,bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,rev.report_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 55
WHERE 1=1
  AND bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND rev.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , o.completed_at AS timestamp
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND o.total > 0

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , o.completed_at AS timestamp
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND o.total = 0

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , NULLIF(du.first_successful_activation_request_approved_at,'9999-09-09 00:00:00.000') AS timestamp
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.merchant_token = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
  AND du.is_merchant = 1
WHERE du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at IS NOT NULL
  AND YEAR(du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at) <= YEAR(TO_DATE('{{ startDate }}'))

metrics.name: Offer PageView | Offers Sent
metrics.description:
Count of the latest pageviews for `merchant_token` + `product` + `offer_token` combination

Source table for pageview is `customer_data.dashboard.merchant_page`.

Denominator is [Offers Sent](https://growthbook-app.sqprod.co/metric/met_5r6b3iluuavh0s).

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    entity_id as merchant_token
  , properties_product AS product_name
  , properties_offer_set_token AS offer_token
  , 1 AS value
  , MAX(timestamp) as timestamp
  FROM app_capital.app_capital.offer_sets os
  LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_PAGE mp
    ON os.offer_token = mp.properties_offer_set_token AND os.merchant_token = mp.entity_id
  WHERE properties_name = '[Loans] Offer'
    AND properties_product in ('flex_loan', 'mca_global')
    AND entity_type = 'merchant'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

WITH first_order AS (
  SELECT
      merchant_token,
      MIN(ordered_on)::timestamp AS "timestamp"
  FROM APP_BANKING.APP_BANKING_ANALYTICS.debit_card_activation
  WHERE ordered_on IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY merchant_token
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  merchant_token,
  merchant_token AS visitor_id,
  "timestamp"
FROM first_order
WHERE "timestamp" IS NOT NULL
  AND TO_DATE("timestamp") >= '{{ startDate }}'
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC

metrics.name: [GTMI] 14d Any HW Purchase
metrics.description:
Any hardware purchase, including both web and retail channels

Sourced from app_hardware marketing ROIS table. ** note because ROIS table only has purchase date timestamp, it's adjusted forward 1 day to avoid the timestamp falling behind the experiment exposure if on same day

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
     -- hw purchase date is date only (so technically prior midnight)
     -- therefore use next bd to avoid timestamp falling before web visit
     , DATEADD('day', 1, BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS
WHERE TRUE 
  AND BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

FULL OUTER JOIN CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_START_SETUP_GUIDE_ACTION_ITEM t2
    ON  t2.ENTITY_ID = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND DATE(t2.TIMESTAMP) >= '2024-07-15'
    AND DATE(t2.TIMESTAMP) - t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE <= 7

FULL OUTER JOIN CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t3
    ON  t3.ENTITY_ID = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND DATE(t3.TIMESTAMP) >= '2024-07-15'

    AND t3.PROPERTIES_FEATURE_NAME = 'Setup Guide'

WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND COALESCE(t2.PROPERTIES_ACTION_ITEM, t3.PROPERTIES_SUB_ACTION_ITEM) IS NOT NULL
    
GROUP BY ALL

FULL OUTER JOIN CUSTOMER_DATA.DASHBOARD.MERCHANT_CLICK_FEATURE t3

    AND DATE(t3.TIMESTAMP) >= '2024-07-15'

metrics.name: Time To Start Free Trial
metrics.description: time_to_start_free_trial_rtl

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT DISTINCT a.merchant_token
, b.event_ts as timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,treatment_at,event_ts) AS value
FROM (
--test result group
SELECT DISTINCT merchant_token, first_subscribed_at AS treatment_at
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.iterable_list_contacts c
WHERE c.list_id IN ('2342178','2342173')

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT natural_key_contact AS merchant_token, first_impression_at AS treatment_at
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.all_engagement_pivoted
WHERE natural_key_campaign IN ('6391210', '6391088')
) a
JOIN app_bi.hexagon.product_events b
ON b.merchant_token = a.merchant_token
AND b.product_name = 'Square for Retail'
AND b.event_type = 'top_of_funnel'
WHERE b.event_ts >= treatment_at

metrics.name: Sellers Who Signed Up More than 30 Days Ago

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

WHERE 
    t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE < CURRENT_DATE - 30
    AND t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_ENGAGE.APP_ENGAGE_ETL.ADOPTION_EVENTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: BoF Conversion Rate (AR-Generating Products) (30-Day) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t1.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t1.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Good Seller Freeze Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

INNER JOIN (SELECT
                MERCHANT_TOKEN
                ,SUM(TOTAL_TIMES_FROZEN) AS FREEZES 
            FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER 
            WHERE IS_UNIT =1
            GROUP BY 1) du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND FREEZES > 0

metrics.name: Good Seller Adoption Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary ls
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = ls.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    AND ls.USER_TYPE = 'MERCHANT'

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND CARD_PAYMENT_DAYS > 10

WHERE SQ_TOF_EVENT IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: Good Seller AR (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date >= EVENT_TIMESTAMP::date

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Fake Account Payment Activation Rate (Optional docIDV Only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP 
  
 FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
 JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE HAS_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST = TRUE 
AND (r.IS_FA = 1 OR fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)

metrics.name: Fake Account Loss (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP 
  ,TOTAL_LOSS AS VALUE 

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
  
JOIN (SELECT 
        MERCHANT_TOKEN
        ,SUM(LOSS_CENTS/100) AS TOTAL_LOSS
    FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
    JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
        ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
        AND IS_UNIT = 1
    GROUP BY ALL) cb
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = cb.MERCHANT_TOKEN
        
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE (r.IS_FA = 1 OR fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)

metrics.name: Square ToF Conversions
metrics.description:
[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/Full+Funnel+Attribution+Data+Dictionary) The first trial activity of a given merchant across all Square products. The first of the following events:
* Restaurants POS Free Trial
* Loyalty Free Trial
* Marketing Free Trial
* Employee Management Free Trial
* Start Payroll Onboarding
* Retail POS Free Trial
* Create Appointments Account
* Activation (IDV)

[Documentation for app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/1_fact_unified_attribution_marketing)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  tof.merchant_token
  , min(tof.conversion_ts) as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing as tof
where tof.conversion_type = 'sq_tof'
group by tof.merchant_token

select
  userId as user_id,
  latestTrialStartTs as timestamp
from
  tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user
where
  subscriptionCohort != "PARTNER"
  and subscriptionType = "PREMIUM"
  AND subscriptionCohort = "TRIAL"
  AND isChild != TRUE

select distinct 
  userId as user_id,
  latestTrialStartTs as timestamp
from
  tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user
where subscriptionType = "PREMIUM_PLUS"
  AND subscriptionCohort = "TRIAL"
  AND isChild != TRUE

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with 2+ BoF Conversions (AR-Gen Products) (7-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH BOFS_PER_MERCHANT AS

(
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t1.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t1.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
  
GROUP BY ALL
)

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.TIMESTAMP

FROM BOFS_PER_MERCHANT t1

WHERE VALUE >= 2

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (

metrics.name: Number of Hours Until 1st BoF Conversion (All Products) (14-Day Maximum) (Fully Cured Observations Only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
    ,MIN(DATEDIFF(HOUR, t1.USER_CREATED_AT, t2.EVENT_TS)) AS VALUE

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.PRODUCT_EVENTS t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 14
    AND t2.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'

WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 14

GROUP BY ALL

    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
    ,MIN(DATEDIFF(HOUR, t1.USER_CREATED_AT, t2.EVENT_TS)) AS VALUE

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.PRODUCT_EVENTS t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 7
    AND t2.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH BOFS_PER_MERCHANT AS

(
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 14


GROUP BY ALL
)

  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.TIMESTAMP

metrics.name: F15D Total Gross Profit per BoFs

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT merchant_token
, dateadd(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp
, gross_profit_var_usd as value
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary

-- Net banking/capital revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- of first SaaS trxn
    SUM(drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  AND drs.product_category IN ('Banking','Capital')
GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: F63D Sq1 SaaS GP per Seller Sampled (P&P)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token,
  DATEADD(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp,
  COALESCE(gp, 0) as value
FROM
  weebly_analytics.pp_strategy.daily_revenue
WHERE product_category = 'SaaS'
    AND sq1_product_flag = 1

-- gross revenue First 30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp,
    SUM(drs.revenue_gross_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date >= t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE
--   AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE+30
GROUP BY 1
HAVING value > 0

with RBO_score as (
select distinct r.merchant_token 
  , r.event_timestamp
  , first_value(ROUND(activation_model_score,4)) over(partition by rbo.merchant_token order by event_date) as activation_model_score
from APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
INNER JOIN APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO rbo
   on r.merchant_token = rbo.merchant_token
 )
 
SELECT
  merchant_token
  , event_timestamp as timestamp
  , activation_model_score as value
FROM RBO_score

WITH sq_signups AS (
    SELECT
        entity_id AS merchant_token
        , MIN(timestamp) AS signup_ts
    FROM customer_data.onboard.merchant_create_account
    WHERE
        timestamp::DATE > CURRENT_DATE - 60
        AND context_traits_country IN ('US')
    GROUP BY 1
), first_dashboard_view AS (
    SELECT
        eon.*
        , MIN(een.timestamp) AS db_ts
        , MAX(IFF(een.entity_id is null, 0, 1)) AS db_flag
    FROM sq_signups eon
    LEFT JOIN customer_data.dashboard.merchant_page een
        ON eon.merchant_token = een.entity_id
        AND een.context_page_path ilike '/dashboard/%'
        AND een.timestamp > eon.signup_ts
    GROUP BY 1,2
)

SELECT DISTINCT 
  merchant_token
  , db_ts as timestamp
  , DATEDIFF(minute, signup_ts, db_ts) as value
FROM first_dashboard_view

  , entity_id AS merchant_token
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  --, TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(TO_DATE(cdp.recorded_at),TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp
  , timestamp

SELECT 
  anonymous_id AS avt
  , entity_id AS merchant_token
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id

metrics.name: [Adhoc] W2 Artist Search CTR
metrics.description: For the artist fallback picture experiment we only enabled fallback images for artist search (not hybrid suggestions and top hits). This metric measures the artist search CTR by counting clicked items in the artist search tab (clicks) and dividing it by the number of times the artist tab is clicked (views).

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  origin_user.id as user_id,
  origin_ts as timestamp,
  1 as value
FROM
  tidal_silver.search.search_search_selectitem_v1
where
  make_date(ingest_year, ingest_month, ingest_day) >= "2024-11-07"
  and origin_payload_filter_type_enabled = "ARTISTS"
  and (
    origin_payload_query_uuid is not null
    or origin_payload_query_uuid != ""
  )
  and (origin_client.platform in ("android", "web", "desktop") or (origin_client.platform in ("iOS") and left(origin_client.version, 5) >= 2.139))

SELECT
  origin_user.id as user_id,
  origin_ts as timestamp,
  1 as value
FROM
  tidal_silver.search.search_search_selectfilter_v1
where
  make_date(ingest_year, ingest_month, ingest_day) >= "2024-11-07"
  and origin_payload_filter_type = "ARTISTS"
  and (
    origin_payload_query_uuid is not null
    or origin_payload_query_uuid != ""
  )
  and (origin_client.platform in ("android", "web", "desktop") or (origin_client.platform in ("iOS") and left(origin_client.version, 5) >= 2.139))

with all_beauty_solutions_pvs as (
  select distinct
    context_subject_anonymous_token as avt
    , timestamp
  from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
  where properties_link_text = 'All beauty solutions'
    and properties_optly_rendered ilike '%pw_1_0_beauty_hub_test:control%'
    and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
)

select
  pv.avt as avt
  , pv.u_recorded_at as timestamp
  , 1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview pv
left join all_beauty_solutions_pvs as beauty_pvs
       on pv.avt = beauty_pvs.avt
where (pv.webpage_path = '/us/en/solutions/beauty'
   or (
      pv.webpage_path = '/us/en/appointments'
      and beauty_pvs.avt is not null

)

metrics.name: Appointments First Full Prepayment Event | All Experiment Users

select 
    fr.best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
  , min(i.created_at) as timestamp
from appointments.raw_oltp.instruments i

metrics.name: Appointments Prepayment GPV | All Experiment Users
metrics.description: This measures the Appointments Prepayment GPV (in cents) per merchant within the first 30 days of exposure. Appointments Prepayment means a payment was made at the time of booking.

sql.conversionSQL:
select 
    fr.best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
  , i.created_at as timestamp
  , fpt.amount_base_unit_usd as value
from appointments.raw_oltp.instruments i
join app_appointments.public.fact_reservations fr
  on i.reservation_id = fr.reservation_id
join app_bi.hexagon.vfact_payment_transactions fpt
  on i.bill_server_token = fpt.external_bill_token
where 1=1
  and i.payment_type = 'prepayment'
  and i.state = 'charged' -- successful payments only
  and i.created_at BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

Merchants active in the month following the initial 91 days from experiment launch.

metrics.name: IDV Start (F30d Exposure)
metrics.description: Counts merchant who started IDV flow on any platform. The source is using front end and backend data and new logging - use cautiously and flag any issues to @kasia.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  user_id as user_id,
  timestamp as timestamp
FROM
  GROWTHBOOK.PUBLIC.{{snakecase eventName}}

WITH first_order AS (
  SELECT
      merchant_token,
      MIN(ordered_on)::timestamp AS "timestamp"
  FROM APP_BANKING.APP_BANKING_ANALYTICS.debit_card_activation
  WHERE ordered_on IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY merchant_token
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  merchant_token,
  merchant_token AS visitor_id,
  "timestamp"
FROM first_order
WHERE "timestamp" IS NOT NULL
  AND TO_DATE("timestamp") >= '{{ startDate }}'
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC

WITH first_order AS (
  SELECT
      merchant_token,
      MIN(ordered_on)::timestamp AS "timestamp"
  FROM APP_BANKING.APP_BANKING_ANALYTICS.debit_card_activation
  WHERE ordered_on IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY merchant_token
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  merchant_token,
  merchant_token AS visitor_id,
  "timestamp"
FROM first_order
WHERE "timestamp" IS NOT NULL
  AND TO_DATE("timestamp") >= '{{ startDate }}'
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC

metrics.name: HiFi Trial to Paid Conversion Rate

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    userId           AS user_id, 
    firstPaidStartTs AS timestamp
FROM tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user
WHERE 
  subscriptionCohort = 'PAID'      -- Now is paying
  AND subscriptionType = "PREMIUM"
  AND totalTimesAsAPaidUser = 1
  AND isUserFromPartner = False
--   AND insertReasons like "%Started Paid Subscription%"

SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.CREATED_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.HDM.FACT_SHOP_LINE_ITEM t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.PRODUCT_READER_TYPE LIKE ANY ('R6', 'R4%', 'R12','S%', 'T2', 'X2')
    AND DATE(t1.CREATED_DATE) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
 
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t1.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t1.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t1.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT merchant_token
    , pe.event_ts AS timestamp
    , 1 AS value
FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof pe
WHERE 1=1   
    AND pe.product_name IN ('Payroll', 'Square Online Store', 'Square Card', 'Marketing')
    AND pe.event_type = 'top_of_funnel'

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with 2+ BoF Conversions (All Products) (7-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH BOFS_PER_MERCHANT AS

(
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.PRODUCT_EVENTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7

GROUP BY ALL
)

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.TIMESTAMP

FROM BOFS_PER_MERCHANT t1

WHERE VALUE >= 2

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.PRODUCT_EVENTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 7
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
  
GROUP BY ALL

  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp,
  s.utterance_id as value
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_eligible_to_show = True
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id
 where mm.medium = 'SMS'

select count(distinct object_id) as value, avt, mql_at as timestamp
from app_marketing.etl.lead_attribution_inbound inb
where mql_at between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
and avt not in ('642e7ba5-de0e-47df-ad5c-3212dfb7b48d')
and channel <> 'deactivation'
and country_code in ('CA', 'US') 
and revenue_range in ('$500k - $1M')
group by all

SELECT
    fr.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    , fr.deduplicated_risk_initiation_date AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.shealth_risk_actions_dedup_filtered_all_sellers fr
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units) fa
    ON fr.merchant_token = fa.merchant_token
WHERE fr.deduplicated_risk_action IN ('veriff+ssp','veriff','silent_freeze_only_money_movement_disrupted','freeze w/o CTA','ssp + freeze')
AND fa.merchant_token IS NULL
AND deduplicated_risk_initiation_date <= current_date

SELECT 
adop.merchant_token
, MIN(adop.event_date) timestamp
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption_category adop
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT vdm
ON adop.merchant_token = vdm.merchant_token
WHERE 1=1
AND product_category = 'Processing'
AND event_desc IN ('processed_fifth_transaction')
AND SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
--AND adop.event_date between merchant_created_at_date and merchant_created_at_date + 14
group by 1

metrics.name: TTP Transactions (35D) | Exposure
metrics.description:
GPV on the Processing product capped at 35 days/840 hours. 
It could be on any Processing product.
The time window starts from the time they join the experiment.
This is one of the main metrics we track on the SPOS side. 

More info here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Hv5YmzxzpkUP9By3hqdiiEBebCa5wpjLMPAZFCtfeGo/edit#heading=h.2l73koxxeriz

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token,
  report_date as timestamp, -- account for timestamp delay
  CASE WHEN reader_type='MCR' THEN transaction_count ELSE 0 END as value

FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_processing_summary

-- with chargeback_loss as (
-- SELECT 
--         MERCHANT_TOKEN
--         , chargeback_date as timestamp
--         ,SUM(LOSS_CENTS/100) AS value
-- FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
-- JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
--     ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
--     AND IS_UNIT = 1
-- GROUP BY ALL
-- )


-- SELECT chargeback_loss.* 
-- FROM chargeback_loss
-- LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
--         FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
--     ON chargeback_loss.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
-- WHERE (fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)

with chargeback_loss as (
SELECT 
    d.user_token
    ,d.chargeback_date
    ,ROUND(d.loss_cents * ex.base_unit_to_unit_multiplier * ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0) AS loss_dollars_usd
FROM app_risk.app_risk.chargebacks d
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON TO_DATE(d.payment_created_at) = TO_DATE(ex.exchange_rate_date)
    AND ex.from_currency_code = d.currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD'
)

SELECT 
    du.merchant_token
    ,cl.chargeback_date AS timestamp
    ,SUM(COALESCE(loss_dollars_usd,0)) AS value
FROM chargeback_loss cl
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
    ON cl.user_token = du.user_token
    AND IS_UNIT = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT merchant_token
     FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON du.merchant_token = fa.merchant_token 
WHERE (fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY 1,2

SELECT DISTINCT
        merchant_token
      , COALESCE(veriff_positive_decision_at, veriff_negative_decision_at) as timestamp
FROM app_risk.app_risk.veriff_sellers 
WHERE veriff_type = 'ONBOARD'

SELECT DISTINCT pentagon_merchant_token as merchant_token
, created_at AS timestamp 
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_shop_line_item
WHERE 1=1
    AND PAYMENT_STATUS = 'paid'
    AND PRODUCT_READER_TYPE ILIKE 'T2%' OR PRODUCT_READER_TYPE ILIKE 'T3%' OR PRODUCT_READER_TYPE ILIKE 'X2%' OR PRODUCT_READER_TYPE ILIKE 'S3%' OR PRODUCT_READER_TYPE ILIKE 'S1%'

SELECT
    fr.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    , fr.deduplicated_risk_initiation_date AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.shealth_risk_actions_dedup_filtered_all_sellers fr
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units) fa
    ON fr.merchant_token = fa.merchant_token
WHERE fr.deduplicated_risk_action IN ('veriff+ssp','veriff','silent_freeze_only_money_movement_disrupted','freeze w/o CTA','ssp + freeze')
AND fa.merchant_token IS NULL
AND deduplicated_risk_initiation_date <= current_date

with chargeback_loss as (
SELECT 
    d.user_token
    ,d.chargeback_date
    ,ROUND(d.loss_cents * ex.base_unit_to_unit_multiplier * ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0) AS loss_dollars_usd
FROM app_risk.app_risk.chargebacks d
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON TO_DATE(d.payment_created_at) = TO_DATE(ex.exchange_rate_date)
    AND ex.from_currency_code = d.currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD'
)

SELECT 
    du.merchant_token AS merchant_token
    ,cl.chargeback_date AS timestamp
    ,SUM(COALESCE(loss_dollars_usd,0)) AS value
FROM chargeback_loss cl
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
    ON cl.user_token = du.user_token
    AND IS_UNIT = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT merchant_token
     FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON du.merchant_token = fa.merchant_token 
WHERE fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2

metrics.name: Setup Guide +1 Task Completion Rate (7-Day) (Requires Task Start) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN APP_ONBOARDING.NSM.CONSOLIDATED_SETUP_GUIDE_DETAILS t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND DATE(t2.FIRST_COMPLETED) BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 7
    AND t2.TASK_LIKELY_COMPLETED_IN_SETUP_GUIDE_FLAG = 1

WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 7

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Number of Hours Until 1st Setup Guide Task Started (7-Day Maximum) (Of Sellers Who Started Setup Guide Task) (2024+)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
    ,MIN(DATEDIFF(HOUR, t1.USER_CREATED_AT, t2.FIRST_STARTED)) AS VALUE

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN APP_ONBOARDING.NSM.CONSOLIDATED_SETUP_GUIDE_DETAILS t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND DATE(t2.FIRST_STARTED) BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 7

WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
    
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: F15D Sq1 SaaS GP per Seller Sampled

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token,
  DATEADD(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp,
  gp as value
FROM
  weebly_analytics.pp_strategy.daily_revenue
WHERE product_category = 'SaaS'
    AND sq1_product_flag = 1

-- net revenue First 30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp,
    SUM(drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date >= t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE
--   AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE+30
GROUP BY 1
HAVING value > 0

-- Gross processing revenue by merchant
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- first processing trxn
    SUM(drs.revenue_gross_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.product_category = 'Processing'
GROUP BY 1
HAVING value > 0

-- gross Banking revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp,
    SUM(drs.revenue_gross_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  AND drs.product_category IN ('Banking','Capital')
GROUP BY 1
HAVING value > 0

with free_trials AS (
      SELECT
        merchant_token as best_available_merchant_token
      , report_date as the_date
      , case when token like 'loyalty_pos_%' then 'pos' else 'dashboard' end as onboarding_source
      , case when token like '%payg%' then 'payg' else 'tiered' end as pricing_type
      FROM app_bi.hexagon.vfact_subscription_states_expanded
      WHERE complete_status IN ('in_trial_trial', 'in_trial_future_start')
      AND product_parent_name= 'Loyalty'
      GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
      )
      
      SELECT
        today.best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
      , dateadd('day', 1, today.the_date) as timestamp
      , today.onboarding_source
      , today.pricing_type
      FROM free_trials today
      LEFT JOIN free_trials yesterday
        ON DATEADD(day,1,yesterday.the_date) = today.the_date
       AND today.best_available_merchant_token = yesterday.best_available_merchant_token
      WHERE yesterday.the_date IS NULL
      GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN

                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'

GROUP BY ALL

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

metrics.name: Still Active 35D after First Card Payment

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

JOIN (SELECT merchant_token, latest_card_payment_date, first_card_payment_date
           FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary  
           WHERE user_type = 'UNIT'
           GROUP BY ALL) AS ls
    ON r.merchant_token = ls.merchant_token 


LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND latest_card_payment_date >= dateadd('day', 35, first_card_payment_date)

metrics.name: GPV | All Experiment Users (.001% Outliers Capped)
metrics.description:
Gross Payment Volume. The total amount of money that moves through Square's system over a given period.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/GPV)

### Notes
* the signup timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups.signup_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  kpis.merchant_token
  , signup.signup_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(gpv_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signup
        on kpis.merchant_token = signup.merchant_token
where kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at <= '{{ endDate }}'

  signup_at as timestamp

metrics.name: Square ToF Conversions | Click on Navigation
metrics.description:
[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/Full+Funnel+Attribution+Data+Dictionary) The first trial activity of a given merchant across all Square products. The first of the following events:
* Restaurants POS Free Trial
* Loyalty Free Trial
* Marketing Free Trial
* Employee Management Free Trial
* Start Payroll Onboarding
* Retail POS Free Trial
* Create Appointments Account
* Activation (IDV)

[Documentation for app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/1_fact_unified_attribution_marketing)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  tof.merchant_token
  , min(tof.conversion_ts) as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing as tof
where tof.conversion_type = 'sq_tof'
group by tof.merchant_token

metrics.name: [DS] 30D Conversion Rate to Paid
metrics.description: Conversion to paid rate in the first 30 days after exposure: includes trial-to-paid conversion as well as churn-to-paid re-subscriptions

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  userId as user_id,
  pStartDate as timestamp
FROM
  tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user
WHERE subscriptionCohort = 'PAID'
AND previousSubscriptionCohort != 'PAID'
AND isChild = FALSE

SELECT
  entity_id as merchant_token,
  min(timestamp) as timestamp
FROM
  CUSTOMER_DATA.INVOICES.MERCHANT_PAY_INVOICE
GROUP BY 1

with first_invoice as (
SELECT
  entity_id as merchant_token
  , min(timestamp) as first_invoice_sent_at
FROM
  CUSTOMER_DATA.INVOICES.MERCHANT_SEND_INVOICE
 GROUP BY 1
 )
 
 
 SELECT
  msi.entity_id as merchant_token
  , min(msi.timestamp) as timestamp
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.INVOICES.MERCHANT_SEND_INVOICE msi
INNER JOIN first_invoice fi
    ON msi.entity_id = fi.merchant_token
    AND msi.timestamp > fi.first_invoice_sent_at
 GROUP BY 1

with first_paid_invoice as (
SELECT
  entity_id as merchant_token,
  min(timestamp) as first_invoice_paid_at
FROM
  CUSTOMER_DATA.INVOICES.MERCHANT_PAY_INVOICE
GROUP BY 1
)


SELECT
  mpi.entity_id as merchant_token,
  min(mpi.timestamp) as timestamp
FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.INVOICES.MERCHANT_PAY_INVOICE mpi
INNER JOIN first_paid_invoice fpi 
    ON mpi.entity_id = fpi.merchant_token
    AND mpi.timestamp > fpi.first_invoice_paid_at
  
GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: MCR Tap-to-pay
metrics.description:
Merchants using MCR tap to pay (i.e. non-Square hardware tap to pay, usually mobile phone)
https://square.slack.com/archives/C08MM9WSD0R/p1745946830686329?thread_ts=1745943751.482779&cid=C08MM9WSD0R

sql.conversionSQL:
-- https://square.slack.com/archives/C08MM9WSD0R/p1745946830686329?thread_ts=1745943751.482779&cid=C08MM9WSD0R
SELECT
    du.merchant_token
  , MIN(fpt.payment_trx_recognized_at) AS timestamp
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vfact_payment_transactions AS fpt
JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user as du
  ON fpt.user_id = du.user_id
WHERE 1=1
  AND reader_type = 'MCR' -- Non-Sq hardware tap-to-pay (ie mobile phones)
  AND payment_trx_recognized_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
GROUP BY ALL

select
    merchant_token
  , product_category
  , event_date as timestamp
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption_category
where product_category = 'Payments SaaS'
  and event_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

-- Net SaaS revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT DISTINCT
    drs.merchant_token,
    drs.report_date as timestamp
    -- MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- of first SaaS trxn
    -- SUM(drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd) as net_saas_revenue_f30d
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  AND drs.product_category = 'SaaS'
  AND drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd > 0
-- GROUP BY 1
-- HAVING net_saas_revenue_f30d > 0

-- Net banking/capital revenue by merchant F30d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, -- of first SaaS trxn
    SUM(drs.revenue_net_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date >= t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE
  AND drs.product_category IN ('Banking','Capital')
GROUP BY 1

SELECT
  avt,
  u_recorded_at AS timestamp
FROM
  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_webpage_scroll_engagement_event
WHERE
  scroll_depth >= 25
  AND u_recorded_at BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
  AND webpage_path = '/us/en/campaign/payments/reader'

UNION ALL

  anonymous_id AS avt,

FROM

WHERE
  timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
  AND properties_link_text LIKE 'Look at comparison chart'

  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 14
    AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 14
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: AR 35-Day | All Experiment Users (Top 0.3% Outliers Capped)
metrics.description:
This is replicated from the "AR 35-Day | All Experiment Users" metric, adding the percentile capping.

Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 35Day for all users in the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the square tof conversion timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at`)
* the top 0.3% outliers (out of +3 standard deviation) were swapped with the value at 99.7% percentile (percentile is calculated among the pooled variants in a given experiment)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , sq_tof_conversion_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(ar_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

SELECT
  pe.best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token,
  pe.converted_at as timestamp
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.grm_product_events pe
WHERE 1=1
    AND pe.event_name = 'savings_open_account'
    AND pe.product_name = 'Savings'

metrics.name: Any Hardware Device First Payment Events (Shop devices)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  ftd.merchant_token
  , CASE
      WHEN ftd.reader_type_key LIKE 'S3%MOUNT' THEN 'S3M' --S3M is never a connected product, that I've seen so far
      WHEN ftd.reader_type_bundle ILIKE '%s1%' THEN 'S1'
      WHEN ftd.reader_type_bundle ILIKE '%s3%' THEN 'S3'
      ELSE ftd.reader_type_family
    END AS final_reader_type
  , CASE
      WHEN ftd.reader_type_family IN ('R4x', 'MCR') THEN ftd.reader_identifier --We will see if R42 also reports reader_id
      WHEN ftd.reader_type_bundle ILIKE '%bundle' AND SUBSTR(ftd.connected_hw_product, 1, 1) = 'S' THEN ftd.connected_fatp_serial --If ever a bundle assign the stand serial_num
      ELSE ftd.fatp_serial
    END AS final_fatp_serial
  , MIN(ftd.payment_date) AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_transactions_daily ftd
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
  ON fr.fatp_serial = ftd.fatp_serial
  AND NOT (fr.reader_type_key LIKE 'R4%')
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr2
  ON fr2.reader_identifier = ftd.reader_identifier
  AND fr2.reader_type_key LIKE 'R4%'
WHERE NOT (ftd.reader_type_family IN ('MCR', 'CNP'))
  AND COALESCE(fr.retailer_name_key,fr2.retailer_name_key) LIKE 'Shop -%'
GROUP BY 1,2,3
HAVING timestamp >= '{{ startDate }}'

WHERE TO_DATE(fp.first_payment_time) >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , IFF(COALESCE(du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at,'9999-09-09 00:00:00.000') = '9999-09-09 00:00:00.000'

  AND timestamp = '{{ endDate }}'

select dps.merchant_token as merchant_token
, dps.merchant_token as avt
    , dps.merchant_token as visitor_id
,DATEADD(second, 86399, report_date) as timestamp
,sum(adjusted_revenue_var_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary  AS dps
left join weebly_analytics.online_store.sos_kpi_signups so on dps.merchant_token =so.merchant_token
left join app_bi.hexagon.vdim_product dp on dps.key_product = dp.key_product
left join fivetran.weebly_data.saas_service_id_lookup lkup on lkup.service_id_raw = dp.natural_key_product
where dps.product_parent_name in ('Square Online Store','On Demand Delivery','Self Serve Order','Seller Powered Delivery')
and sos_signup_at is not null
and so.currently_banned_date is null
and so.user_deleted = 0
and (dps.product_category = 'SaaS' and product_line = 'hosting')
and report_date between sos_signup_at and dateadd(day,30,sos_signup_at)
Group by 1,2,3,4

SELECT merchant_token, 
min(event_ts) as timestamp, 
count(distinct product_name) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.product_events p 
  where p.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
group by 1

SELECT DISTINCT
    fo.created_at::DATE AS created_date
    , fo.created_at 
    , fo.completed_at::DATE AS completed_date
    , fo.completed_at AS timestamp
    , fo.sq_avt AS avt
    , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
    , COALESCE(ROUND(fo.total * NULLIF(ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0), 2) , 0) AS cart_total_usd
    , CASE
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL AND sku.reader_type IN ('Stand') THEN 'S1'
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(sku.reader_type)
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NULL AND pk.product_key IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(pk.reader_type)
        WHEN v.sku ILIKE '%kit%' THEN 'Kit'
        WHEN third.sku IS NOT NULL THEN '3PP'
        ELSE NULL
      END::VARCHAR AS product_reader_type
    , CASE
        WHEN fo.sq_shared = 1 THEN 'shared_cart'
        ELSE 'ecomm'
      END AS order_type
    , fo.sq_internal
  FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders fo
  INNER JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_line_items AS li
    ON li.order_id = fo.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users 
    ON users.id = fo.user_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_addresses AS address ON address.id = fo.ship_address_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_states AS geo_state ON geo_state.id = address.state_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_stores AS store ON fo.store_id = store.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_variants AS v
    ON v.id = li.variant_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_products AS p
    ON p.id = v.product_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_adjustments AS adj
    ON adj.order_id = fo.id
    AND adj.adjustable_id = li.id
    AND adj.label ILIKE 'Promotion%'
    AND adj.eligible = 'TRUE'
    AND adj.finalized = 'TRUE'
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.third_party_periph_sku_to_product_map AS third
    ON third.sku = v.sku
    AND third.row_num = 1
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.dim_hardware_sku AS sku
    ON sku.sku = v.sku
  LEFT JOIN fivetran.app_hardware_staging.reader_type_from_product_key AS pk
    ON pk.product_key = p.sq_product_key
  LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON COALESCE(created_date,completed_date) = ex.exchange_rate_date
    AND fo.currency = ex.from_currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD' 
  WHERE 1=1
    AND fo.sq_rejected_at IS NULL
    AND fo.number NOT ILIKE '%WR%'
    AND p.name NOT ILIKE '%rma%'
    AND fo.created_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
    AND fo.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
    AND fo.completed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND order_type <> 'shared_cart'
    AND fo.sq_internal != TRUE
    AND ((cart_total_usd >= 298 AND cart_total_usd < 500) OR COALESCE(product_reader_type,'na') = 'T2')

metrics.name: MQLs (IE)
metrics.description:
A merchant identified through form submission or via third-party data enrichment where the merchant indicates a revenue range of greater than $250k. The revenue range is also dependent on the location (rev range by geo) and if it is not an existing merchant then it is routed to Salesforce as an MQL.

Notes:
- `country_code = 'IE'`
- no filter on `revenue_range`
- MQL within 7 days of entering test

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt
  , min(mql_at) as timestamp
from app_marketing.etl.lead_attribution_inbound
where country_code = 'IE'
--   revenue_range != '$100k - $250k' 
  and mql_at >= '{{ startDate }}'
group by avt

  , u_recorded_at as timestamp
  , 1 as value
from  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview pw 
where webpage_path in (
        '/us/en/hardware')
  and u_recorded_at between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

select

   , timestamp
   ,1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where properties_link_text in ('Buy now', 'Buy')
  and context_page_path in ('/us/en/hardware')
  and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT

  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp,
  s.utterance_id as value
FROM

            is_suggestion,

            shown_at,

metrics.name: Good Seller NPA (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,t1.MERCHANT_NPA_TOTAL / 100 AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1
    ON r.merchant_token = t1.merchant_token
    AND t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL

metrics.name: Good Seller AR7 (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.event_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN event_timestamp::DATE AND event_timestamp::DATE + 7

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Good Seller AR35 (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Fake Account Chargeback Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP 
  
 FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
 
JOIN (SELECT 
        MERCHANT_TOKEN
        ,SUM(CHARGEBACK_CENTS/100) AS TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS 
    FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
    JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
        ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
        AND IS_UNIT = 1
    GROUP BY ALL) cb
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = cb.MERCHANT_TOKEN
        
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE (r.IS_FA = 1 OR fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)
AND TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS > 0

metrics.name: Payment Conversion Rate (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_USER_LIFETIME_SUMMARY ls
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = ls.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND ls.USER_TYPE = 'MERCHANT'
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL 
AND LIFETIME_GPV_AMOUNT_BASE_UNIT_USD > 0

metrics.name: Good Seller BoF Conversion Rate (7D, All Products) (Optional docIDV use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

LEFT JOIN app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis mmk
    ON  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = mmk.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa

metrics.name: Sellers Who Signed Up More than 28 Days Ago

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

WHERE 
    t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE < CURRENT_DATE - 28
    AND t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  origin_user.id as user_id,
  origin_ts as timestamp
FROM
  tidal_silver.onboarding.subscription_pay_confirm_v1

SELECT merchant_id AS merchant_token 
        , MIN(created_at) AS timestamp 
FROM roster.merchants.employees 
WHERE  is_account_owner = FALSE 
AND is_active = TRUE 
group by 1

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.PRODUCT_EVENTS t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t2.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 14
    AND t2.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
    AND (
        (t2.PRODUCT_NAME = 'Partner App' AND t2.EVENT_DESC = 'first_transaction')
        OR t2.PRODUCT_NAME != 'Partner App'
        )
        
WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Time to Square POS BoF -> Adoption (Processing)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH bof AS (
    SELECT merchant_token
        , DATE(event_ts) AS bof_dt
    FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof
    WHERE 1=1
        AND product_name = 'Square POS'
        AND event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    )
, adopt AS (
    SELECT merchant_token
        , event_date AS adopt_dt
    FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption
    WHERE 1=1
        AND product_name = 'Square POS'
        AND product_category = 'Processing'
)
SELECT bof.merchant_token
    , adopt.adopt_dt AS timestamp /* Processig Adoption Timestamp */
    , TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, bof.bof_dt, adopt.adopt_dt) AS value
FROM bof
INNER JOIN adopt
    ON bof.merchant_token = adopt.merchant_token

SELECT DISTINCT
    cc.event_key AS event_key
  , cc.event_timestamp AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.override_declines od
ON cc.event_key = od.transaction_token
INNER JOIN banklin.raw_oltp.transaction_events te
ON cc.event_key = concat('ST$_MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD_', te.external_system_id)
    AND te.external_system = 'MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD'
    AND te.type = 'DECLINED'
    AND te.octopus_result = 'IN_APP_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED'
    AND te.created_at::date >= (SELECT min(event_timestamp)::date
                                FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking 
                                WHERE experiment = '{{experimentId}}')
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
    AND od.authentication_response IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE::DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(ls.LIFETIME_GPV_AMOUNT_BASE_UNIT_USD/100) AS VALUE
  
FROM app_risk.app_risk.rbo_test r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_USER_LIFETIME_SUMMARY ls
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = ls.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND ls.USER_TYPE = 'MERCHANT'
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL

SELECT
  merchant_token as merchant_token,
  first_successful_activation_request_approved_at_date as timestamp
FROM app_risk.app_risk.shealth_proactive_docIDV_experiment_extended_audiences
WHERE completed_docidv_veriff = 1

WITH FRAC_NPA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NPA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NPA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NPA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

WITH FRAC_NVA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_NVA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NVA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_NVA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NVA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NVA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

Incorrect conclusion could be produced without including the additional variance/error. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for more information.

metrics.name: AR 7-Day | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 7Day for all users in the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the square tof conversion timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.sq_tof_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
inner join app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
        using(merchant_token)
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date + 7
group by all

metrics.name: AR 21-Day | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 21Day for all users in the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the square tof conversion timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_summary.merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.sq_tof_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
inner join app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
        on revenue_summary.merchant_token = merchant_summary.merchant_token
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date  + 21
group by all

metrics.name: AR 35-Day | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 35Day for all users in the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the square tof conversion timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.sq_tof_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
inner join app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
        using(merchant_token)
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date + 35

with signups as (
  select
    distinct fact_signups.best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
    , fact_signups.signup_at::date as min_timestamp
  from app_bi.pentagon.fact_signups
  left join app_measurement.adhoc.square_decisions_flattened
        on best_available_merchant_token = merchant_token
        and experiment_id = '{{ experimentId }}'
        and first_timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'
  where signup_at::date >= first_timestamp::date
)
, tof_conversion as (
  select
    merchant_token
    , min(conversion_ts) as conversion_ts
  from app_marketing.public.fact_unified_attribution_marketing
  where conversion_type = 'sq_tof'
  group by merchant_token
)

select
  signups.merchant_token
  , conversion_ts::date as timestamp
from signups
left join tof_conversion on signups.merchant_token = tof_conversion.merchant_token
                        and tof_conversion.conversion_ts >= signups.min_timestamp

metrics.name: BoF Conversions
metrics.description:
Can be thought of as a seller fully converting to a product (e.g. a revenue generating event like first payment or converting to a paid subscription); the seller has a bank account on file.

[BoF Milestones | go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/bi/Product+Events)

Notes:
* first product bottom of funnel (where conversion_type = 'product_bof')
* excludes products T2 and X2

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  bof.merchant_token,
  min(signups.signup_at) as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.vfact_unified_attribution_sq_bof_attribution as bof
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signups
        on bof.merchant_token = signups.merchant_token
where bof.bof_conversion_product_name not in ('T2', 'X2')
group by bof.merchant_token

origin_payload_itemType in ("TRACK", "PLAYLIST", "ALBUM", "MIX", "VIDEO")

metrics.name: SPOS First Item Creation | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
First item creation event by the seller after signup.

Please check [SPOS Growth Metrics](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Qfpfm6eKr2i3vwWgpxCh7ABo2jmodb620cxnVbu3jNo/edit?usp=sharing) for more information.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    du.merchant_token
    , min(u_recorded_at) as timestamp
FROM eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction cfi
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.vdim_user du
    ON du.user_token = CASE WHEN cfi.subject_unit_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_unit_token
                            WHEN cfi.subject_USER_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_USER_token
                            ELSE cfi.subject_merchant_token END
WHERE 1=1
  AND cfi.catalog_feature_interaction_feature_name IN ( 'Item Created', 'Item Saved', 'Item Edited')
  AND cfi.u_app_name IN ('register-ios', 'register-android', 'dashboard')
  group by 1

metrics.name: SPOS Onboard Completion | All Experiment Users
metrics.description:
First dashboard (web) or Checkout applet (app) event after signup. This event indicates completion of onboarding flow. Some steps might be skipped so it doesn't mean completing successfully but reaching to the end of the flow.

Please check [SPOS Growth Metrics](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Qfpfm6eKr2i3vwWgpxCh7ABo2jmodb620cxnVbu3jNo/edit?usp=sharing) for more information.

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
        best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
        , to_timestamp(min(first_dashboard_or_app_checkout_flow)) timestamp
FROM
      app_onboarding.product_intent.product_intent_merchant_facts
WHERE 
1=1
AND source_application  IN ('register-ios' , 'web', 'register-android', 'mobile_web')
AND first_dashboard_or_app_checkout_flow < '9999-09-09'
group by 1

SELECT
  avt as avt,
  u_recorded_at as timestamp,
FROM
  app_mktg_web.attribution.public_webpage_scroll_engagement_event
WHERE 1=1
  and scroll_depth > 25
  and u_recorded_at BETWEEN  '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
  and webpage_path = '/us/en/campaign/payments/reader'

metrics.name: Future of RST Passive Lead Submission Visitors - BIR LP

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    lce.avt
     , lead_submission_at AS timestamp  
FROM app_marketing.public.vfact_lead_submission_funnel lce
WHERE
    1=1
  AND lead_submission_type = 'Public Web'
  AND marketo_program_name = 'us_cont_202502_restaurantspos_futureofrst_turtl_editorial'
  AND (lce.referrer like '%/us/en/point-of-sale/restaurants/future-needs%' or lce.referrer_detail like '%/us/en/point-of-sale/restaurants/future-needs%')
  AND lead_submission_at between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

SELECT 
  fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , fsl.order_number AS cart_id
  , MIN(created_at) AS timestamp
  , MAX(IFF(product_reader_type IN ('R12', 'R4', 'R41', 'R42', 'S3', 'S1', 'T2', 'X2', 'T3'),1,0)) AS flag_1p
  , MAX(IFF(COALESCE(product_reader_type,'na') NOT IN ('R12', 'R4', 'R41', 'R42', 'S3', 'S1', 'T2', 'X2', 'T3', 'BRAN') 
            AND COALESCE(product_family,'na') NOT IN ('Square Marketing')
            AND product_key <> 'r4-s3-add-on'
            AND is_saas_line = FALSE,1,0)) AS flag_3p
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_shop_line_item fsl
WHERE TRUE
  AND created_date >= '{{ startDate }}' 
GROUP BY ALL
HAVING flag_1p = 1 AND flag_3p = 1

SELECT 
  fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token

metrics.name: GPV | All Experiment Users (0.1% Outliers Capped)
metrics.description:
Gross Payment Volume. The total amount of money that moves through Square's system over a given period.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/GPV)

### Notes
* the signup timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups.signup_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  kpis.merchant_token
  , signup.signup_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(gpv_35_day_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis
inner join app_marketing.public.vfact_signups as signup
        on kpis.merchant_token = signup.merchant_token
where kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at <= '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: AR 35-Day | All Experiment Users (0.1% Outliers Capped)
metrics.description:
Adjusted Revenue: payments volume minus the supply chain (acquiring banks, card networks, issuing banks) costs.

[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/AR)

### Notes
* this metric includes the AR 35Day for all users in the experiment, based on the Segmentation chosen
* the square tof conversion timestamp is used to determine whether the conversion during the test (`app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis.sq_tof_conversion_at`)

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , merchant_summary.sq_tof_at as timestamp
  , sum(revenue_summary.adjusted_revenue_fxd_usd) as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.merchant_funnel_summary as merchant_summary
inner join app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary as revenue_summary
        using(merchant_token)
where revenue_summary.report_date between
      merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date and merchant_summary.sq_tof_at::date + 35
group by all

-- gross revenue by merchant F60d
SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp,
    SUM(drs.revenue_gross_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 60
  AND drs.product_category = 'SaaS'
GROUP BY 1
HAVING value > 0

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel' and event_desc in ('first_transaction')
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.merchant_created_at_date AND t2.merchant_created_at_date + 14

    AND SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
  
GROUP BY ALL

WITH idv_events AS (
    -- IDV'd after experiment start
    SELECT
        t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS merchant_token,
        MIN(t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE) AS idv_timestamp
    FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1
    INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
        ON t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
        AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    WHERE t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
)
SELECT
    i.merchant_token,
    MIN(e.event_ts) AS timestamp -- first_transaction_ts
FROM idv_events i
INNER JOIN growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof e
  ON  i.merchant_token = e.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  AND e.event_desc LIKE '%subscri%'
  AND e.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
  AND e.event_ts BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1

SELECT
  userId as user_id,
  ts as timestamp,
  pageViews as value
FROM
  tidal_per_metrics.homepage.view_metrics

WITH AR70_data as (
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS AR70
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 70

GROUP BY ALL 
)

, AR35_data as (
SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS AR35
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL 
)

select
    AR70_data.merchant_token as merchant_token
    , AR70_data.timestamp as timestamp
    , AR70 - AR35 as value 
from AR70_data
join AR35_data using(Merchant_token)

metrics.name: SQ IDV Start Rate (F7D Created)
metrics.description: Any seller who lands on the Business Information in the IDV Web flow is considered to have started the IDV Activation flow.
