SELECT a.merchant_token, timestamp
FROM 
(
    SELECT entity_id as merchant_token,
    MIN(TIMESTAMP) as timestamp
    FROM CUSTOMER_DATA.ONBOARD.MERCHANT_VIEW_ONBOARDING_FUNNEL_STEP
    WHERE PROPERTIES_SCREEN_TITLE IN ('business-information', 'business-information.index','Activation Flow Entry Point','business-type','business-type.index')
    GROUP BY 1
) a
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT b
ON a.merchant_token = b.merchant_token
WHERE SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
    AND a.TIMESTAMP between merchant_created_at_date and merchant_created_at_date + 7

SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.volume_gross_fxd_usd) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP::DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d PAR Rate
metrics.description: Payment activation request in first 7d after exposure to experiment based on merchant token

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT M.MERCHANT_TOKEN
     , M.BEST_AVAILABLE_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_CREATED_AT AS TIMESTAMP
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT M
WHERE M.BEST_AVAILABLE_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_CREATED_AT BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

WITH FRAC_NPA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NPA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_TOTAL_NPA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NPA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NPA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d BoF 35d GPV (avt)
metrics.description: Only works for optimizely experiments

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_BOF_GPV35D_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_GPV_35_DAY_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NVA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    JOIN APP_MKTG_INTL.INTL_PROD.MERCHANT_ENGAGEMENT ME
    ON ME.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP <= ME.SIGNUP_AT -- exclude post signup AVTs (existing audience)
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_GPV_35_DAY_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NVA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_BOF_GPV35D_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d BoF 35d GP (avt)
metrics.description: Metric specific to Optimizely experiment AVTs

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_GP_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    JOIN APP_MKTG_INTL.INTL_PROD.MERCHANT_ENGAGEMENT ME
    ON ME.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP <= ME.SIGNUP_AT -- exclude post signup AVTs (existing audience)
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_GP_FRAC          AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: Shop Funnel - Added Debit to Cart

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  cdp.subject_anonymizedusertoken AS avt
  , cdp.subject_merchanttoken AS merchant_token
  , COALESCE(cdp.subject_merchanttoken,cdp.subject_anonymizedusertoken) AS visitor_id
  , cdp.recorded_at AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.adhoc.hw_shop_checkout_cdp_events_base cdp
WHERE TO_DATE(recorded_at) >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND cdp.product_order_sku = 'checking-debit-card' 
  AND cdp.eventvalue = 'add_product'

select merchant_token 
        , MIN(first_event_ts) AS timestamp
from app_pa.app_sqs.sqs_feature_usage 
where feature_name =  'labor_commissions'
group by 1

SELECT
                u_recorded_at as timestamp
                , subject_merchant_token as merchant_token
           FROM eventstream2.catalogs.PAGE_VIEW e
          WHERE e.u_app_name IN ('payroll', 'dashboard', 'staff')
            AND e.u_recorded_date >= '2023-01-01'
            AND e.webpage_path IN ('/payroll/employer/intro')

SELECT
                u_recorded_at as timestamp
                , subject_merchant_token as merchant_token
           FROM eventstream2.catalogs.PAGE_VIEW e
          WHERE e.u_app_name IN ('payroll', 'dashboard', 'staff')
            AND e.u_recorded_date >= '2023-01-01'
            AND e.webpage_path IN ('/dashboard/staff/payroll/subscribe')

select distinct merchant_token 
        , employee_token AS value
        , ts_employee_created AS timestamp 
from app_pa.app_team_management.employees 
where is_owner_role = 0 
and is_active = 1

SELECT userId as user_id,
eventStartTs as timestamp
FROM tidal_gold.gold.vdim_user_intraday
WHERE subscriptionCohort = 'CHURNED'
AND isChild = FALSE

SELECT 
  rev.merchant_token
  , rev.merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp  
  --, report_date AS timestamp
  , adjusted_revenue_var_usd AS value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary rev
LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.all_tof_merchants bof
  ON bof.merchant_token = rev.merchant_token
  AND DATEDIFF(DAY,bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,rev.report_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 35
WHERE 1=1
  AND bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.GPV_GROSS_FXD_USD) AS VALUE

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_PROCESSING_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 28
    AND t1.REPORT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
  
GROUP BY ALL

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 21
  
GROUP BY ALL

, converted_at AS timestamp

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with 2+ BoF Conversions (All Products)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH BOFS_PER_MERCHANT AS

(
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1.PRODUCT_NAME) AS VALUE
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7

GROUP BY ALL
)

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t1.TIMESTAMP

FROM BOFS_PER_MERCHANT t1

WHERE VALUE >= 2

SELECT
    t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    
WHERE t1.BANK_ACCOUNT_LINKED_DATE != '9999-09-09'

GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Time to Square POS ToF -> Adoption (Processing)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH tof AS (
    SELECT merchant_token
        , DATE(event_ts) AS tof_dt
    FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof
    WHERE 1=1
        AND product_name = 'Square POS'
        AND event_type = 'top_of_funnel'
    )
, adopt AS (
    SELECT merchant_token
        , event_date AS adopt_dt
    FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption
    WHERE 1=1
        AND product_name = 'Square POS'
        AND product_category = 'Processing'
)
SELECT tof.merchant_token
    , adopt.adopt_dt AS timestamp /* Processig Adoption Timestamp */
    , TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, tof.tof_dt, adopt.adopt_dt) AS value
FROM tof
INNER JOIN adopt
    ON tof.merchant_token = adopt.merchant_token

SELECT DISTINCT
    cc.event_key AS event_key
  , cc.event_timestamp AS timestamp 
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.override_declines od
ON cc.event_key = od.transaction_token
INNER JOIN banklin.raw_oltp.transaction_events te
ON cc.event_key = concat('ST$_MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD_', te.external_system_id)
    AND te.external_system = 'MARQETA_BUSINESS_CARD'
    AND te.type = 'DECLINED'
    AND te.octopus_result = 'IN_APP_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED'
    AND te.created_at::date >= (SELECT min(event_timestamp)::date
                                FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking 
                                WHERE experiment = '{{experimentId}}')
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
    AND od.authentication_response = 'TRANSACTION_AUTH_RESPONSE_TRANSACTION_RECOGNIZED'

SELECT
    tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
  , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
  , count(DISTINCT cc.event_key) AS value
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
GROUP BY tr.unit_context_token

WITH payment_exposure AS (
SELECT
    user_token AS unit_token
    , SUM(chargeback_cents/100) AS exposure
    , SUM(loss_cents/100) AS losses
    , 'payment' AS type
FROM app_risk.app_risk.chargebacks
WHERE reason_code_type = 'fraud'
GROUP BY 1
)

-- add funds losses
, add_funds_losses AS (
SELECT
    unit_token,
    SUM(loss_estimate) AS losses -- loss
FROM app_risk.banking_warehouse.add_funds_dispute_loss
GROUP BY 1
)

-- add funds chargebacks
, add_funds_chargebacks AS (
SELECT 
    unit_token,
    SUM(add_funds_cents/100) AS exposure,
FROM app_risk.app_risk.add_funds_chargebacks
GROUP BY 1
)

, add_funds_exposure AS (
SELECT 
    add_funds_chargebacks.unit_token,
    add_funds_chargebacks.exposure,
    add_funds_losses.losses,
    'add_funds' AS type
FROM add_funds_chargebacks
LEFT JOIN add_funds_losses
ON add_funds_chargebacks.unit_token = add_funds_losses.unit_token
)

-- app_risk.banking_warehouse.sq_card_dispute_loss
, sq_card_exposure AS (
SELECT
    unit_token,
    SUM(dispute_amount_usd) AS exposure,
    SUM(loss_amount_usd) AS losses,
    'sq_card' AS type
FROM app_risk.banking_warehouse.sq_card_dispute_loss
WHERE TAXONOMY = 'Compromised_Card'
GROUP BY 1
)

-- app_risk.banking_warehouse.check_acceptance_loss
, check_acceptance_exposure AS (
SELECT 
    unit_token,
    SUM(check_acceptance_loss.amount_dollars) AS exposure,
    SUM(check_acceptance_loss.loss_estimate) AS losses,
    'check_acceptance' AS type
FROM app_risk.banking_warehouse.check_acceptance_loss
GROUP BY 1
)

, all_exposure AS (
SELECT *
FROM payment_exposure
UNION
SELECT *
FROM add_funds_exposure
UNION
SELECT *
FROM sq_card_exposure
UNION
SELECT *
FROM check_acceptance_exposure
)

, exposure_by_user AS (
SELECT 
    unit_token AS user_token, 
    SUM(exposure) AS exposure, 
    SUM(losses) AS losses
FROM all_exposure
GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
    tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
  , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
  , sum(ebu.losses) AS value
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
INNER JOIN exposure_by_user ebu
ON tr.unit_context_token = ebu.user_token
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units fau
ON tr.unit_context_token = fau.unit_token
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
GROUP BY tr.unit_context_token

SELECT
    tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
  , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
  , '{{valueColumn}}' AS value
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units fau
ON tr.unit_context_token = fau.unit_token
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
GROUP BY tr.unit_context_token

SELECT
    tr.unit_context_token AS unit_token
  , min(tr.event_timestamp) AS timestamp
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking cc
INNER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.transfer_request_v0 tr
ON cc.event_key = tr.event_id
LEFT OUTER JOIN app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units fau
ON tr.unit_context_token = fau.unit_token
WHERE cc.experiment = '{{experimentId}}'
    AND cc.should_be_queued = 1
    AND cc.disqualified != 1
    AND fau.unit_token IS NULL
GROUP BY tr.unit_context_token

metrics.name: Shop Funnel - 1P Add to Cart (GP or Shop PDP)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT
  cf.entity_id AS merchant_token
  , cf.anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(cf.entity_id,cf.anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , cf.properties_additional_parameters_order_order_number AS cart_id
  , cf.timestamp
  , LOWER(COALESCE(cf.properties_additional_parameters_product, cf.properties_additional_parameters_kit_first_party_product)) AS product
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_click_feature cf
WHERE TRUE
 AND TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
 AND properties_event_description IN 
   ('Click Product Configuration Modal - add_to_cart', 
    'Click Product Action Card - add_to_cart', 
    'Click Kit Card Buy Now - buy_now', 
    'Click Kit Card - add_to_cart')
UNION ALL

SELECT
    hw.subject_merchanttoken AS merchant_token
    , hw.subject_anonymizedusertoken AS avt
    , COALESCE(hw.subject_merchanttoken,hw.subject_anonymizedusertoken) AS visitor_id
    , order_number AS cart_id
    , hw.recorded_at AS timestamp
    , LOWER(COALESCE(reader_type_key,parent_product)) AS product
  FROM app_hardware.adhoc.hw_shop_checkout_cdp_events_base hw
  WHERE TRUE
   AND TO_DATE(recorded_at) >= '{{ startDate }}'
   AND eventname = 'AddProduct'
 )
 WHERE 
   CASE 
      WHEN LOWER(product) LIKE 'r4%' THEN 'r4x'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('r12d', 'r12') THEN 'r12'
      WHEN LOWER(product) LIKE 's3%kiosk' THEN 's3-kiosk'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('s3b', 's3b stand') THEN 's3'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('t2b', 't2') THEN 't2'
      WHEN LOWER(product) IN ('x2b', 'x2') THEN 'x2'
   END IN ('r4x','r12', 'x2', 't2', 's3', 's3-kiosk')

SELECT
  merchant_token,
  dateadd(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp, -- account for timestamp delay
  volume_gross_fxd_usd as value
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary
 WHERE product_category = 'Processing'

metrics.name: HW Rec Flow - Add to Cart 1P + 3P

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
  merchant_token
  , merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , MAX(timestamp) AS timestamp
  , MAX(IFF(funnel_product_type IN ('r12d', 'r4', 'r41', 'r42', 'r4-s3-add-on', 's3-mount', 's3b','s3b-kiosk','t2','x2'),1,0)) AS flag_1p
  , MAX(IFF(funnel_product_type IS NOT NULL AND funnel_product_type NOT IN ('r12d', 'r4', 'r41', 'r42', 'r4-s3-add-on', 's3-mount', 's3b','s3b-kiosk','t2','x2') AND funnel_product_type NOT LIKE 'sw-%',1,0)) AS flag_3p
FROM app_hardware.etl_preprod.dim_fact_goldenpath_hardware_shop_flow_event ee
WHERE first_flow_event_ts::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND funnel_step = 'Add to Cart'

GROUP BY ALL
HAVING flag_1p = 1 AND flag_3p = 1

It could be on any Processing product.
The time window starts from the time they join the experiment.

More info here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Hv5YmzxzpkUP9By3hqdiiEBebCa5wpjLMPAZFCtfeGo/edit#heading=h.2l73koxxeriz

metrics.name: F35D SaaS Conversion Rate | All Products | Exposure | Including Upsell

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  vfact_subscription_states_expanded.merchant_token,
  -- adding 2 days to account for experiment exposure date and subscription status change
  vfact_subscription_states_expanded.report_date::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day' - INTERVAL '1 second' AS timestamp
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vfact_subscription_states_expanded
WHERE
  vfact_subscription_states_expanded.report_date >= '{{startDate}}'
  AND ((
    -- SquareOne upgrades from Free Trial or Free
    vfact_subscription_states_expanded.complete_status_yesterday NOT IN  ('paying_in_grace', 'paying_active')
    AND vfact_subscription_states_expanded.complete_status = 'paying_active'
    AND vfact_subscription_states_expanded.tier IN ('plus', 'premium')
    AND current_cost_amount > 0
  ) OR (
    -- Legacy upgrades from Free Trial or Free
    vfact_subscription_states_expanded.complete_status_yesterday NOT IN  ('paying_in_grace', 'paying_active')
    AND vfact_subscription_states_expanded.complete_status = 'paying_active'
    AND vfact_subscription_states_expanded.tier IS NULL
    AND vfact_subscription_states_expanded.token NOT ilike '%free%'
    AND current_cost_amount > 0
  ))

WITH 
        avt_merchant_map AS (
            SELECT 
             subject_anonymous_token as avt
             , subject_merchant_token as merchant_token
        FROM eventstream2.catalogs.page_view pv 
       WHERE webpage_full_url ILIKE 'https://squareup.com/us/en/payroll%'
         AND u_recorded_at >= '2023-10-16'
    GROUP BY 1,2
        )
        SELECT
            map.avt
            , pe.event_ts AS timestamp
       FROM app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
       JOIN avt_merchant_map map
         ON map.merchant_token = pe.merchant_token
      WHERE pe.product_name = 'Payroll'
        AND pe.event_type = 'top_of_funnel'
   GROUP BY 1,2

select
    merchant_token
  , event_ts as timestamp
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_all
where LOWER(product_category) = 'saas'
  and event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
  and event_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
    cv.merchant_token
  , cv.product_name
  , MIN(cv.event_ts) AS timestamp
FROM growth_mktg.public.vfact_merchant_product_events cv
WHERE 1=1
  AND cv.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
  AND cv.event_desc = 'first_transaction'
  AND cv.product_name IN ('Square Online Checkout','Register Terminal','Virtual Terminal','Invoices','Terminal API')
  AND cv.event_ts::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  EVENT_KEY,
  EVENT_CREATED_AT AS TIMESTAMP,
  LOSS_EUR AS VALUE
FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.GB_EU_3DS_NON_MANDATED_PMTS_AB_TEST
WHERE AUTH_SUCCESS = TRUE

select 
    pe.merchant_token 
    ,pe.event_ts as timestamp 
    ,pe.product_name
    ,pe.event_type

metrics.name: Fake Account Chargeback Rate (% of GPV)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH chargebacks AS (
SELECT 
    user_token
    ,d.chargeback_date
    ,ROUND(d.chargeback_cents * ex.base_unit_to_unit_multiplier * ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0) AS chargeback_dollars_usd
FROM app_risk.app_risk.chargebacks d
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON TO_DATE(d.payment_created_at) = TO_DATE(ex.exchange_rate_date)
    AND ex.from_currency_code = d.currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD'
)

SELECT 
     du.merchant_token AS merchant_token
    ,cb.chargeback_date AS timestamp
    ,SUM(COALESCE(chargeback_dollars_usd,0)) AS value
FROM chargebacks cb
JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du ON cb.user_token = du.user_token AND du.is_unit=1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT merchant_token
    FROM app_risk.app_risk.fake_account_units) fa
    ON fa.merchant_token = du.merchant_token
WHERE fa.merchant_token IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2

  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_completing_order_error_payment
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
UNION ALL
SELECT

  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp

*/
SELECT
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_view_checkout_step
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND properties_step IN ('Review Order - Payment Error'
                         , 'CheckoutV3 - Completing Payment Error'
                         )
UNION ALL
SELECT
  entity_id AS merchant_token
  , anonymous_id AS avt
  , COALESCE(entity_id,anonymous_id) AS visitor_id
  , properties_order_number AS cart_id
  , timestamp
FROM customer_data.solidshop.anonymous_visitor_view_checkout_step
WHERE TO_DATE(timestamp) >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND properties_step IN ('Review Order - Payment Error'

SELECT

  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN

            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted

 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id
 where mm.medium = 'EMAIL'

FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN

            was_shown, 
            shown_at,

FROM

 JOIN

            is_suggestion,

 WHERE product_category = 'SaaS'
 AND GROSS_PROFIT_VAR_USD>0

SELECT
    du.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,du.user_created_at AS TIMESTAMP 
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON du.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
where IS_MERCHANT = 1    
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL

SELECT
    du.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,du.user_created_at AS TIMESTAMP 
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON du.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
where IS_MERCHANT = 1    
and HAS_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST = TRUE 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  u.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN,
  u.user_created_at as TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
 FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.vdim_user u 
    
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL 
AND rs.report_date >= timestamp
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
  u.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN,
  u.user_created_at as TIMESTAMP,
  SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
 FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.vdim_user u 
    
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL 
AND rs.report_date >= timestamp
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN user_created_at AND DATEADD(DAY, 7, u.user_created_at)
GROUP BY ALL

WITH hardware_orders AS (
    SELECT entity_id AS merchant_token
        , timestamp
        , CAST(value AS STRING) AS product_slug
    FROM customer_data.solidshop.merchant_view_checkout_step
    , LATERAL FLATTEN(input => properties_order_product_slugs) AS value
    WHERE 1=1
        AND properties_step = 'Order Complete'
)
SELECT merchant_token
    , MIN(timestamp) AS timestamp
FROM hardware_orders
WHERE 1=1
    AND product_slug IN ('restaurant-mobile-pos-kit'
                , 'register-wifi-pos-kit'
                , 'stand-pos-kit'
                , 'terminal'
                , 'ipad-pos-stand'
                , 'register-pos'
                , 'card-reader')
GROUP BY 1

SELECT
 gem.merchant_token
, pe.event_ts AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,timestamp,event_ts) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl_preprod.growthbook_experiments_merged_variants gem 
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
ON gem.merchant_token = pe.merchant_token
    AND pe.product_name = 'Square for Restaurants'
    AND pe.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
    AND pe.event_ts >= timestamp 
    AND (pe.event_ts BETWEEN timestamp AND dateadd(day,30,timestamp))
WHERE gem.variation_id IN ('2396926','2396928')

SELECT DISTINCT best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
, converted_at AS timestamp 
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.grm_product_events
WHERE event_name = 'Any_hardware_purchase_shop_retail'

SELECT 
 gem.merchant_token
, converted_at AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,timestamp,converted_at) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl_preprod.growthbook_experiments_merged_variants gem 
LEFT JOIN app_engage.app_engage_etl.grm_product_events gpe
ON gem.merchant_token = gpe.best_available_merchant_token
    AND gpe.event_name = 'Any_hardware_purchase_shop_retail'
    AND gpe.converted_at >= timestamp 
    AND (gpe.converted_at BETWEEN timestamp AND dateadd(day,30,timestamp))
WHERE gem.variation_id IN ('2396926','2396928')

SELECT 
 gem.merchant_token
, converted_at AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,timestamp,converted_at) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl_preprod.growthbook_experiments_merged_variants gem 
LEFT JOIN app_engage.app_engage_etl.grm_product_events gpe
ON gem.merchant_token = gpe.best_available_merchant_token
AND gpe.product_name = 'Square for Restaurants'
    AND gpe.event_name = 'create_first_menu'
    AND gpe.converted_at >= timestamp

 gem.merchant_token

ON gem.merchant_token = gpe.best_available_merchant_token
AND gpe.product_name = 'Square for Restaurants'
    AND gpe.event_name = 'create_first_device'
    AND gpe.converted_at >= timestamp

FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.iterable_list_contacts
WHERE list_id IN ('2536518')

b.merchant_token

metrics.name: [GTMI] 91d BoF Rate
metrics.description:
BoF rate in first 91d after exposure to experiment based on merchant token

Source table: APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
     , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
FROM APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
WHERE SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: [GTMI] 91d BoF NVA (avt)
metrics.description: Total NVA by AVT from first 91d BoF in the experiment

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_NVA_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_NVA_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_NVA_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_NVA_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_NVA_FRAC         AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_NVA_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

WITH idv_events AS (
    -- IDV'd after experiment start
    SELECT
        t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS merchant_token,
        MIN(t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE) AS idv_timestamp
    FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1
    INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
        ON t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
        AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    WHERE t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
)
SELECT
    i.merchant_token,
    MIN(e.event_ts) AS timestamp -- first_transaction_ts
FROM idv_events i
INNER JOIN growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof e
  ON  i.merchant_token = e.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  AND e.event_desc = 'first_transaction'
  AND e.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
  AND e.event_ts BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: NPA | All Experiment Users (total_npa_usd) - Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation
metrics.description: Net Profit Added: net profit added (NPA) is the first year adjusted revenue from acquisition into the Square ecosystem and is used to evaluate new to Square efforts. NPA is a predictive metrics that will have additional variance/error which is not included in the current error band and p value. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation.

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  merchant_token
  , sq_tof_conversion_at as timestamp
  , coalesce(total_npa_usd, 0) as value
from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

SELECT pe.merchant_token as merchant_token
    , pe.event_ts as timestamp 
    , pe.product_name
    , pe.event_type 
FROM app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
WHERE 1=1 
    AND product_name = 'Register POS'
    AND event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'

WITH all_conversions AS (
    SELECT pe.merchant_token as merchant_token
        , pe.event_ts as timestamp 
        , pe.product_name
        , pe.event_type 
    FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof pe
    WHERE 1=1 
        AND product_name IN ('Square Online Checkout', 'Virtual Terminal'
                    , 'Register POS', 'Invoices', 'Square Online Store')
        AND event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
)
, more_than_one_bof AS (
    SELECT merchant_token
        , COUNT(DISTINCT product_name) AS bof_count
        , MAX(timestamp) AS timestamp
    FROM all_conversions
    GROUP BY 1
    HAVING bof_count > 1
)
SELECT ac.merchant_token
    , ac.timestamp
FROM all_conversions ac
INNER JOIN more_than_one_bof mo
    ON ac.merchant_token = mo.merchant_token

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , o.completed_at AS timestamp
  , o.payment_total
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.completed_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.sq_avt AS avt
  , NULLIF(du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at,'9999-09-09 00:00:00.000') AS timestamp
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.merchant_token = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
  AND du.is_merchant = 1
WHERE du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at IS NOT NULL
  AND YEAR(du.first_attempted_activation_request_created_at) <= YEAR(TO_DATE('{{ startDate }}'))

metrics.name: Payroll EE per ER Full Service (first month)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) as value 
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss
     ON pss.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', pss.run_sent_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', pels.first_payrun_sent_at)
    AND pels.is_contractor_only = False
GROUP BY 1,2

SELECT
        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , CASE WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = False
               THEN 35.0 + 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) 
               WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = True
               THEN 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id)
                END as value
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss
     ON pss.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', pss.run_sent_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', pels.first_payrun_sent_at)
    AND pels.is_contractor_only = False
GROUP BY 1,2

metrics.name: Subs Retention (F30D)
metrics.description:
Of those sellers who converted to paid within the F30D of exposure, % of them are still paying subs after 30D of their
 first subscription.

sql.conversionSQL:
with paying_active as (
SELECT
      merchant_token
    , MIN(the_date) AS first_hosting_at
  FROM weebly_analytics.ecom_saas.so_hosting_dimensions_daily sdd
  where complete_status IN ('paying_active','paying_in_grace','paying_pending_canceled','paying_pending_paused')
  and complete_status_yesterday NOT IN ('paying_active','paying_in_grace','paying_pending_canceled','paying_pending_paused') 
  GROUP BY 1
)

select 
shdd.merchant_token
,shdd.merchant_token as avt
,shdd.merchant_token as visitor_id
,min(the_date) as timestamp
FROM weebly_analytics.ecom_saas.so_hosting_dimensions_daily as shdd
left join paying_active on shdd.merchant_token = paying_active.merchant_token
where complete_status IN ('paying_active','paying_in_grace','paying_pending_canceled','paying_pending_paused')
and plan_token != 'square-online-free'
and the_date = dateadd(day,30,first_hosting_at)
group by 1,2,3

select dps.merchant_token as merchant_token
,dps.merchant_token as avt
,dps.merchant_token as visitor_id
,DATEADD(second, 86399, report_date) as timestamp
,sum(adjusted_revenue_var_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary  AS dps
left join weebly_analytics.online_store.sos_kpi_signups so on dps.merchant_token =so.merchant_token
where dps.product_parent_name in ('Square Online Store','On Demand Delivery','Self Serve Order','Seller Powered Delivery')
and sos_signup_at is not null
and so.currently_banned_date is null
and so.user_deleted = 0
and dps.product_category = 'Processing'
-- and report_date between sos_signup_at and dateadd(day,30,sos_signup_at)
Group by 1,2,3,4

metrics.name: Paying Active Subs (F30D)
metrics.description: First time when SO sellers became "paying active" in a SaaS hosting plan

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
      merchant_token
    , merchant_token as avt
    , merchant_token as visitor_id
    , DATEADD(second, 86399, DATE_TRUNC('day', MIN(the_date))) AS timestamp
  FROM weebly_analytics.ecom_saas.so_hosting_dimensions_daily sdd
  where complete_status IN ('paying_active')
  and complete_status_yesterday NOT IN ('paying_active') 
  GROUP BY 1

SELECT merchant_token, 
min(event_ts) as timestamp, 
count(distinct product_name) as value
from app_bi.hexagon.product_events p 
  where p.event_type = 'top_of_funnel'
group by 1

select merchant_token, first_card_payment_date as timestamp
 FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_USER_LIFETIME_SUMMARY ls
where lifetime_gpv_amount_base_unit_usd > 0

SELECT
    u.merchant_token, 
        user_created_at as timestamp
 FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.vdim_user u 
inner JOIN (SELECT 
        MERCHANT_TOKEN
        ,SUM(CHARGEBACK_CENTS/100) AS TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS 
    FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.CHARGEBACKS cb
    JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER du1
        ON cb.USER_TOKEN = du1.BEST_AVAILABLE_UNIT_TOKEN
        AND IS_UNIT = 1
    GROUP BY ALL) cb
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = cb.MERCHANT_TOKEN
        
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON u.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
WHERE (fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NOT NULL)
AND TOTAL_CHARGEBACKS > 0

SELECT 
  rev.merchant_token
  , rev.merchant_token AS visitor_id
  --, TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp

LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.all_tof_merchants bof

WHERE 1=1

metrics.name: Bounce on US Contact Sales Page
metrics.description:
### Definition
The source table for this metric is [`app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview`](https://coda.io/d/go-publicwebhome_dGONvFyOhfa/Page-View-Table_suUpM#_lualS).

A bounce is defined as a pageview that's flagged as both the first and last page in a session; `start_page_flag` and `exit_page_flag` respectively.

### Query Logic
* this metric is filtered on the US version of the Contact Sales page; *country field derived from webpage_path if the country is within the url*

sql.conversionSQL:
select
  avt, 
  u_recorded_at as timestamp
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview 
where webpage_path = '/us/en/sales/contact' 
  and exit_page_flag
  and start_page_flag
  and pageview_country = 'US'

SELECT

  , actionable_traffic
  , {{valueColumn}} as value
  , event_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM app_risk.app_risk.champion_challenger_experiment_cohort_tracking
WHERE (score > 0.95 OR score < 0.05)

WITH buckets AS (
SELECT merchant_token, first_subscribed_at AS treatment_at, 'holdout' AS bucket
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.iterable_list_contacts
WHERE list_id IN ('2514881')
  AND TO_DATE(first_subscribed_at) >= '2023-05-31'


UNION

SELECT natural_key_contact AS merchant_token, first_impression_at AS treatment_at, 'treatment' AS bucket
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.all_engagement_pivoted
WHERE natural_key_campaign IN ('6884920')
  AND TO_DATE(first_impression_at) >= '2023-05-31'
)


SELECT
b.merchant_token
, ae.event_date AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, treatment_at, event_date) AS value
FROM buckets b 
LEFT JOIN app_engage.app_engage_etl.adoption_events ae
ON b.merchant_token = ae.merchant_token
    AND ae.product_name = 'Register Terminal'
    AND ae.event_date >= treatment_at 
    AND ae.event_date BETWEEN treatment_at AND DATEADD(DAY, 14, treatment_at)

metrics.name: RTL Number of Items Created in RTL POS

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
    u_recorded_at as timestamp
  , du.merchant_token
  , 1 AS value
FROM eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction cfi
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.vdim_user du
    ON du.user_token = CASE WHEN cfi.subject_unit_token != '' THEN cfi.subject_unit_token

metrics.name: Multi-Product BoFs (At least 1)
metrics.description:
Sellers within multi-product onboarding workflow that BoF'ed into at least 1 of the BAPI products (see below) that were selected for this experiment. 

Product Names:
> Square Online Checkout,
> Virtual Terminal,
> Register POS,
> Invoices,
> Square Online Store

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT pe.merchant_token as merchant_token
    , pe.event_ts as timestamp 
    , pe.product_name
    , pe.event_type 
FROM app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
WHERE 1=1 
    AND product_name IN ('Square Online Checkout', 'Virtual Terminal'
                , 'Register POS', 'Invoices', 'Square Online Store')
    AND event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'

SELECT gb.merchant_token
    , MIN(pe.event_ts) AS timestamp
    , TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, MIN(gb.timestamp), MIN(pe.event_ts)) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.gb_dim_exp gb
LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.product_events pe
    ON gb.merchant_token = pe.merchant_token
        AND product_name IN ('Square Online Checkout', 'Virtual Terminal'
                        , 'Register POS', 'Invoices', 'Square Online Store')
        AND event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
        AND pe.event_ts >= timestamp 
        AND (pe.event_ts BETWEEN timestamp AND dateadd(day,30,timestamp))
WHERE experiment_id = 'mpo_multi_product_onboarding'
GROUP BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT
    subject_merchanttoken AS merchant_token 
    , recorded_at AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.adhoc.hw_shop_checkout_cdp_events_base flow
WHERE flow.recorded_at >= '{{ startDate }}'  
  AND flow.recorded_at <= '{{ endDate }}'
  AND eventvalue LIKE '%terminal-credit-card-machine'
  AND merchant_token IS NOT NULL

metrics.description: Time difference between experiment treatment start and appointments_first_transaction (appointments_first_transaction: https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/bi/Product+Events)

sql.conversionSQL:
--for Frictionless ONB Q3 experiment
SELECT 
 gem.merchant_token
, converted_at AS timestamp
, TIMESTAMPDIFF(second,timestamp,converted_at) AS value
FROM app_engage.app_engage_etl.growthbook_experiments_merged_variants gem

WHERE product_name IN ('Square Online Checkout','Register Terminal','Virtual Terminal','Invoices','Terminal API')
  AND dps.report_date >= DATEADD('day', 35, '{{ startDate }}')
-- GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: Hardware Purchase Rate (Shop) (since merchant created) (Fully Cured Obs)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.HDM.FACT_SHOP_LINE_ITEM t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    REGEXP_LIKE(t1.PRODUCT_READER_TYPE, 'R6|R4.*|R12|S.*|T2|X2', 'i')
    AND DATE(t1.CREATED_DATE) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND current_Date
    -- AND CURRENT_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE > 30

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
   pentagon_merchant_token as merchant_token
  , MIN(return_created_date) AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_return_item
where return_created_date between '{{ startDate }}' and current_date
group by 1

SELECT
    drs.merchant_token,
    MIN(drs.report_date) AS timestamp, 
    SUM(drs.gross_profit_fxd_usd) as value
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary AS drs
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = drs.merchant_token
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1
WHERE drs.report_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND drs.report_date >= t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE
  AND drs.product_category IN ('Processing')
GROUP BY 1

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(MIN(t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE),TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
INNER JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
  ON du.merchant_token = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
  AND du.is_merchant = 1
INNER JOIN APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1
  ON  du.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN du.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND du.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Shop Orders - SQ BoF Rate (Growth)
metrics.description: Used only for experiments bucketed by cart_id

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , MIN(EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders AS o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users ON users.id = o.user_id
LEFT JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
  ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
  AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
LEFT JOIN growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_sq_bof t1
  ON t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token)
WHERE 
  t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  o.number AS cart_id
  , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
  , o.completed_at AS timestamp
  , TIMEDIFF(MINUTE,o.created_at, o.completed_at) AS value
FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders o
LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users 
    ON users.id = o.user_id 
WHERE o.completed_at >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND o.total > 0

SELECT 
        ftd.merchant_token,
        MIN(ftd.payment_date) as timestamp
    FROM app_hardware.hdm.vfact_transactions_daily ftd
    WHERE ftd.reader_type_family NOT IN ('CNP', 'MCR')
        AND ftd.payment_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
    GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: Transacted on SQ Hardware + Activated SQ Hardware

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH hw_activations AS (
    -- activated SQ hardware:
    SELECT
      tarkin_first_seen_merchant_token AS merchant_token
      , tarkin_first_seen_datetime AS timestamp
    FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
    WHERE tarkin_first_seen_datetime::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
        UNION ALL
    SELECT
      pentagon_first_best_available_merchant_token AS merchant_token
      , first_seen_datetime AS timestamp
    FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
    WHERE reader_type_key LIKE 'R4%'
      AND first_seen_datetime::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
)
-- transacted on SQ hardware:
SELECT 
    ftd.merchant_token,
    MIN(ftd.payment_date) as timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.vfact_transactions_daily ftd
INNER JOIN hw_activations AS ha
  on ftd.merchant_token = ha.merchant_token
WHERE ftd.reader_type_family NOT IN ('CNP', 'MCR')
    AND ftd.payment_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
GROUP BY 1

metrics.name: SQ IDV Seller Success Rate (7D) | Signup

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
MERCHANT_TOKEN
, FIRST_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_APPROVED_AT::TIMESTAMP  AS timestamp
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_MERCHANT
WHERE 1=1
AND SOURCE_USER_TYPE= 'SQUARE SELLER'
AND FIRST_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_APPROVED_AT < '9999-01-01'
AND FIRST_SUCCESSFUL_ACTIVATION_REQUEST_APPROVED_AT_DATE between merchant_created_at_date and merchant_created_at_date + 7

SELECT
    DISTINCT
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_ONBOARDING.ONBOARDING_SURVEYS.GP_PHASE_1_DASHBOARD_SURVEY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE >= '2024-07-01'

WHERE 
    DATE(t1.RESPONSE_TIMESTAMP_UTC) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30

SELECT DISTINCT
  fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS visitor_id
  , fsl.order_number AS cart_id
  , fsl.created_at AS timestamp
  , fsl.product_reader_type
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_shop_line_item fsl
WHERE product_reader_type LIKE 'R4%'
  AND created_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
  t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.HDM.FACT_SHOP_LINE_ITEM t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.PENTAGON_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    REGEXP_LIKE(t1.PRODUCT_READER_TYPE, 'R6|R4.*|R12|S.*|T2|X2', 'i')
    AND DATE(t1.CREATED_DATE) BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
 
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: NPA | All Experiment Users (0.1% Outliers Capped) - Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation
metrics.description: Net Profit Added: net profit added (NPA) is the first year adjusted revenue from acquisition into the Square ecosystem and is used to evaluate new to Square efforts. NPA is a predictive metrics that will have additional variance/error which is not included in the current error band and p value. Incorrect conclusion could be produced without including the additional variance/error. Check #ltv_npa_npe SLACK channel for additional error/variance estimation.

from app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis as kpis

metrics.name: Payment Verification (IDV) Start
metrics.description:
### Definition

Identity verification process documented in onboarding. [go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/GLOS/IDV).

### helpful link(s)
* [IDV](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/intl/IDV)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT 
        best_available_merchant_token AS merchant_token
      , activation_attempt_date AS timestamp
    FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

select
  user.id as user_id,
  ts as timestamp, 
  1 as value
from
  tidal_silver.analytics.analytics_click_module_v1
where
  year = '2023'
  and month >= 10
  and endResult in ('playback', 'navigation')
  and client.platform in ('iOS', 'android')

metrics.name: Appointments First Plus Trial Start | All Experiment Users
metrics.description: This measures the number merchants that start a Plus free trial for the first time within the first 35 days of exposure

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token,
       min(the_date) as timestamp
FROM app_appointments.public.appointments_merchant_daily_summary
WHERE subscription_complete_status_yesterday NOT IN ('in_trial_trial','in_trial_future_start') AND subscription_complete_status IN ('in_trial_trial','in_trial_future_start')
AND subscription_plan_token = 'appointments-plus'
group by 1

SELECT
  s.utterance_id,
  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_accepted=true
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id

SELECT 
        merchant_token as merchant_token
        , started_onboarding_at AS timestamp
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary

SELECT
  rev.merchant_token,
  rev.merchant_token AS visitor_id,
  TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp,
  IFF(reader_type IN ('R4', 'O1', 'M1'),'R4',reader_type) AS reader_type,
  adjusted_revenue_var_usd AS value
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_processing_summary rev
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.all_tof_merchants bof ON bof.merchant_token = rev.merchant_token
  AND DATEDIFF(DAY,bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date,rev.report_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 35
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND bof.true_sq_bof_conversion_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
  AND IFF(reader_type IN ('R4', 'O1', 'M1'),'R4',reader_type) = 'R41'

SELECT
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
    AND REGEXP_LIKE(t1.READER_TYPE, 'R6|R4.*|R12|S.*|T2|X2', 'i')

SELECT 
    t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,MIN(t2.FIRST_STARTED) AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t1

INNER JOIN APP_ONBOARDING.NSM.CONSOLIDATED_SETUP_GUIDE_DETAILS t2
    ON  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND DATE(t2.FIRST_STARTED) BETWEEN t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND DATE(t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) + 7

WHERE
    t1.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    AND t1.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
    
GROUP BY ALL

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35
    AND t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD > 0
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Good Sellers Never Frozen & Not Churned

sql.conversionSQL:
with not_churned_sellers as (
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

JOIN (SELECT merchant_token, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN is_currently_churned = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS not_churned
           FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary  
           WHERE user_type = 'UNIT'
           GROUP BY ALL) AS ls
    ON r.merchant_token = ls.merchant_token 


LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND ls.not_churned = 1 
)


, frozen as (
SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_PA.APP_INVOICES.OPTIONAL_DOCIDV_TEST r

INNER JOIN (SELECT
                MERCHANT_TOKEN
                ,SUM(TOTAL_TIMES_FROZEN) AS FREEZES 
            FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER 
            WHERE IS_UNIT =1
            GROUP BY 1) du
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = du.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND FREEZES > 0 
)

select * 
from not_churned_sellers
where merchant_token not in 
(select merchant_token from frozen)

WITH FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_GP_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_GP_FRAC          AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d BoF 35d GP w/ 2% cap (avt)
metrics.description: Joins at AVT level, only works for optimizely experiments

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT AS (
    -- frac nva for merchants with multiple AVTs, single AVT gets 100%
    SELECT K.MERCHANT_TOKEN
         , K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
         , K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD / COUNT(DISTINCT O.AVT) AS BOF_GP_FRAC
    FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
    JOIN APP_MARKETING.PUBLIC.VDIM_MERCHANT_MARKETING_KPIS K
    ON K.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    JOIN APP_MKTG_INTL.INTL_PROD.MERCHANT_ENGAGEMENT ME
    ON ME.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    WHERE TRUE
      AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
      AND O.TIMESTAMP <= ME.SIGNUP_AT -- exclude post signup AVTs (existing audience)
    GROUP BY K.MERCHANT_TOKEN, K.BOF_GP_35_DAY_USD, K.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT
    )
SELECT O.AVT
     , F.SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_AT AS TIMESTAMP
     , F.BOF_GP_FRAC          AS VALUE
FROM MARTECH_EXP_DATA.EXPERIMENTS.OPTIMIZELY_SAMPLES O
JOIN FRAC_BOF_GP35D_AVT F
ON F.MERCHANT_TOKEN = O.MERCHANT_TOKEN
WHERE TRUE
  AND O.EXPERIMENT_ID = '{{ experimentId }}'
  AND O.TIMESTAMP BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: Transacted on SQ Hardware + Activated SQ Hardware (F30d)

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH hw_activations AS (
    -- activated SQ hardware:
    SELECT
      tarkin_first_seen_merchant_token AS merchant_token
      , tarkin_first_seen_datetime AS timestamp
    FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
    WHERE tarkin_first_seen_datetime::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
        UNION ALL
    SELECT
      pentagon_first_best_available_merchant_token AS merchant_token
      , first_seen_datetime AS timestamp
    FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_reader fr
    WHERE reader_type_key LIKE 'R4%'
      AND first_seen_datetime::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
)
-- transacted on SQ hardware:
SELECT 
    ftd.merchant_token,
    MIN(ftd.payment_date) as timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.vfact_transactions_daily ftd
INNER JOIN hw_activations AS ha
  on ftd.merchant_token = ha.merchant_token
WHERE ftd.reader_type_family NOT IN ('CNP', 'MCR')
    AND ftd.payment_date >= '{{ startDate }}'
GROUP BY 1

  ,r.EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

WHERE SQ_TOF_EVENT IS NOT NULL

metrics.name: BoF Conversion Rate (30-Day) (All Products) (RBO use only)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

LEFT JOIN app_marketing.public.vdim_merchant_marketing_kpis mmk
    ON  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = mmk.MERCHANT_TOKEN

WHERE HAS_SQ_BOF = TRUE 
AND SQ_BOF_CONVERSION_DATE <= r.EVENT_DATE  + 30

SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE::DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM app_risk.app_risk.rbo_test r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN event_date AND event_date + 7

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
  r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,r.EVENT_DATE::DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(rs.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS VALUE
  
FROM app_risk.app_risk.rbo_test r
    
JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY rs
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = rs.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL and product_parent_name !='Weebly'
AND rs.report_date BETWEEN event_date AND event_date + 70

GROUP BY ALL

SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary ls
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = ls.MERCHANT_TOKEN 
    AND ls.USER_TYPE = 'MERCHANT'

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND CARD_PAYMENT_DAYS > 10

SELECT 
    r.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
    ,EVENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP

FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.RBO_TEST r

JOIN (SELECT merchant_token, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN is_currently_churned = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS not_churned
           FROM app_bi.hexagon.vagg_user_lifetime_summary  
           WHERE user_type = 'UNIT'
           GROUP BY ALL) AS ls
    ON r.merchant_token = ls.merchant_token 


LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MERCHANT_TOKEN
        FROM APP_RISK.APP_RISK.FAKE_ACCOUNT_UNITS) fa
    ON r.MERCHANT_TOKEN = fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN 

WHERE r.IS_FA = 0 
AND fa.MERCHANT_TOKEN IS NULL
AND ls.not_churned = 1

metrics.name: CTR on TBL Managing Your Finances Pages
metrics.description:
Number of Clicks / Number of Pageviews

This metric is to be used for this [experiment](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RAYCjkr2EDnksQXM41hBrVTubk5LKQkOvDmLrgTQN9w/edit#heading=h.v0jcnxcwc2kc). It's specific to the following pages: 
* /us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/how-to-calculate-break-even-point-analysis
* /us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/your-guide-to-texas-minimum-wage
* /us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/what-is-a-bank-transfer

sql.conversionSQL:
select
   coalesce(context_subject_anonymous_token, anonymous_id) as avt
   , timestamp
   , 1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
where context_page_path in (
         '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/how-to-calculate-break-even-point-analysis'
        , '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/your-guide-to-texas-minimum-wage'
        , '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/what-is-a-bank-transfer')
  and properties_link_url ilike '%the-bottom-line%'
  and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

union

select
   coalesce(context_subject_anonymous_token, anonymous_id) as avt
   , timestamp
   , 1 as value
from customer_data.xms_production.merchant_click_link
where context_page_path in (
         '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/how-to-calculate-break-even-point-analysis'
        , '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/your-guide-to-texas-minimum-wage'
        , '/us/en/the-bottom-line/managing-your-finances/what-is-a-bank-transfer')
  and properties_link_url ilike '%the-bottom-line%'
  and timestamp between '{{ startDate }}' and '{{ endDate }}'

metrics.name: HEX - clicks on global footer, FAB, or SNH module

sql.conversionSQL:
WITH fab_or_footer_clicks_or_snh_clicks AS (
  
-- fab clicks, only counting either FAB clicks or footer clicks 1x per day per article page if seller clicks on both
SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

from customer_data.helpprod.merchant_click_fab

WHERE 1=1
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'
AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION

SELECT
  anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

FROM customer_data.helpprod.anonymous_visitor_click_fab

WHERE 1=1
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'
AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION
  
-- adding in footer clicks, only counting either FAB clicks or footer clicks 1x per day per article page if seller clicks on both
SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path
-- distinct properties_link_text

FROM customer_data.helpprod.merchant_click_link

WHERE 1=1 
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'
AND LOWER(properties_link_parent_id) IN ('footer', 'global_footer')
AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION

SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path
-- distinct properties_link_text

FROM customer_data.helpprod.anonymous_visitor_click_link

WHERE 1=1 
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'
AND LOWER(properties_link_parent_id) IN ('footer', 'global_footer')
AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION
-- adding in search suggestion views (anyone who types into search bar will see search suggestions)

SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

FROM customer_data.helpprod.merchant_view_search_suggestions

WHERE 1=1

AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'

AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION

anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

WHERE 1=1 
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'
AND context_page_path NOT LIKE '%search%'

-- adding in clicks on contact/community buttons on SNH module
SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

WHERE 1=1 
AND entity_type = 'merchant'
AND context_page_path LIKE '%/article/%'

AND LOWER(context_locale_language) IN ('en-us', 'es-us')

UNION

SELECT
anonymous_id
, DATE(received_at) AS date
, context_page_path

SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
       AND (properties_link_url LIKE '%signup%')
       AND context_page_path IN (
               '/us/en/payroll'
           )

SELECT 
        pe.merchant_token as merchant_token
        , pe.event_ts AS timestamp
   FROM growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof pe
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
     ON pe.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND pels.is_contractor_only = False
  WHERE pe.product_name = 'Payroll'
    AND pe.event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'

metrics.name: Payroll PW Non-Overview-Page Any Signup CTA Click Users

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
       AND (properties_link_url LIKE '%signup%')
       AND context_page_path IN (
               '/us/en/payroll/features'
               , '/us/en/payroll/pricing'
               , '/us/en/payroll/benefits'
               , '/us/en/payroll/contractors'
           )

SELECT
        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , CASE WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = False
               THEN 35.0 + 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) 
               WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = True
               THEN 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id)
                END as value
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss
     ON pss.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', pss.run_sent_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', pels.first_payrun_sent_at)
    AND pels.is_contractor_only = True
GROUP BY 1,2

metrics.name: Payroll ARPU Full Service Capped p95

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
        pels.first_paid_run_sent_at as timestamp
        , pels.merchant_token
        , CASE WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = False
               THEN 35.0 + 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id) 
               WHEN MAX(pels.is_contractor_only) = True
               THEN 6.0*COUNT(DISTINCT pss.employee_facet_id)
                END as value
   FROM app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_employer_lifetime_summary pels
   JOIN app_payroll.app_payroll.payroll_stub_summary pss
     ON pss.merchant_token = pels.merchant_token
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', pss.run_sent_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', pels.first_payrun_sent_at)
    AND pels.is_contractor_only = False
GROUP BY 1,2

FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_ATTEMPT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT

where

  and (
    origin_payload_query_uuid is not null
    or origin_payload_query_uuid != ""

  and (origin_client.platform in ("android", "web", "desktop") or (origin_client.platform in ("iOS") and left(origin_client.version, 5) >= 2.139))

SELECT

FROM

where is_inbound = 1

SELECT

  origin_ts AS timestamp

select distinct

  , event_ts as timestamp
  , count(distinct product_name || merchant_token) as value
from growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_tof_bof
where event_type = 'bottom_of_funnel'
group by 1,2

l.square_avt_c as avt , activity_date AS timestamp

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d R12 HW Purchase
metrics.description:
R12 hardware purchase, including both web and retail channels

Sourced from app_hardware marketing ROIS table. ** note because ROIS table only has purchase date timestamp, it's adjusted forward 1 day to avoid the timestamp falling behind the experiment exposure if on same day

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
     -- hw purchase date is date only (so technically prior midnight)
     -- therefore use next bd to avoid timestamp falling before web visit
     , DATEADD('day', 1, BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS
WHERE READER_TYPE = 'R12'
  AND BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'

select
  best_available_merchant_token as merchant_token
  , the_date as timestamp
from app_dashboard.seller_dashboard.mrv_page

metrics.description: Square Online Store (BoF)

metrics.name: RTL Signup CTA
metrics.description: Clicks on the 'Get Started' CTA on Square for Retail owned public web pages

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
    anonymous_id as avt
    , timestamp
FROM customer_data.xms_production.anonymous_visitor_click_link
WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
    AND (properties_link_url LIKE '%signup%')
 and (context_page_path like '%/point-of-sale/retail%')

WITH idv_events AS (
    -- IDV'd after experiment start
    SELECT
        t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS merchant_token,
        MIN(t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE) AS idv_timestamp
    FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1
    INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
        ON t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
        AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
    WHERE t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
)
SELECT
    i.merchant_token,
    MIN(e.event_date) AS timestamp
FROM idv_events i
INNER JOIN growth_mktg.public.vconversion_events_adoption_category e
  ON  i.merchant_token = e.MERCHANT_TOKEN
  AND e.event_desc = 'processed_fifth_transaction'
  AND e.product_category = 'Processing'
  AND e.event_date BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT
    fo.created_at::DATE AS created_date
    --, fo.created_at AS timestamp
    , TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(fo.created_at,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp
    , fo.completed_at::DATE AS completed_date
    , fo.completed_at
    , fo.sq_avt AS avt
    , COALESCE(users.merchant_token, users.legacy_user_model_token) AS merchant_token
    , COALESCE(ROUND(fo.total * NULLIF(ex.exchange_rate_fxd, 0), 2) , 0) AS cart_total_usd
    , CASE
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL AND sku.reader_type IN ('Stand') THEN 'S1'
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(sku.reader_type)
        WHEN sku.reader_type IS NULL AND pk.product_key IS NOT NULL THEN UPPER(pk.reader_type)
        WHEN v.sku ILIKE '%kit%' THEN 'Kit'
        WHEN third.sku IS NOT NULL THEN '3PP'
        ELSE NULL
      END::VARCHAR AS product_reader_type
    , CASE
        WHEN fo.sq_shared = 1 THEN 'shared_cart'
        ELSE 'ecomm'
      END AS order_type
    , fo.sq_internal
  FROM solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_orders fo
  INNER JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_line_items AS li
    ON li.order_id = fo.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.sq_users AS users 
    ON users.id = fo.user_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_addresses AS address ON address.id = fo.ship_address_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_states AS geo_state ON geo_state.id = address.state_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_stores AS store ON fo.store_id = store.id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_variants AS v
    ON v.id = li.variant_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_products AS p
    ON p.id = v.product_id
  LEFT JOIN solidshop.raw_oltp.spree_adjustments AS adj
    ON adj.order_id = fo.id
    AND adj.adjustable_id = li.id
    AND adj.label ILIKE 'Promotion%'
    AND adj.eligible = 'TRUE'
    AND adj.finalized = 'TRUE'
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.etl.third_party_periph_sku_to_product_map AS third
    ON third.sku = v.sku
    AND third.row_num = 1
  LEFT JOIN app_hardware.hdm.dim_hardware_sku AS sku
    ON sku.sku = v.sku
  LEFT JOIN fivetran.app_hardware_staging.reader_type_from_product_key AS pk
    ON pk.product_key = p.sq_product_key
  LEFT JOIN app_bi.hexagon.vdim_exchange_rate ex
    ON COALESCE(created_date,completed_date) = ex.exchange_rate_date
    AND fo.currency = ex.from_currency_code
    AND ex.to_currency_code = 'USD' 
  WHERE 1=1
    AND fo.sq_rejected_at IS NULL
    AND fo.number NOT ILIKE '%WR%'
    AND p.name NOT ILIKE '%rma%'
    AND fo.created_at::DATE >= '{{ startDate }}'
    AND order_type <> 'shared_cart'
    AND fo.sq_internal != TRUE
    AND (cart_total_usd >= 500 OR COALESCE(product_reader_type,'na') = 'X2')

select
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'top_of_funnel'
    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
  
GROUP BY ALL

SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM APP_ENGAGE.APP_ENGAGE_ETL.ADOPTION_EVENTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 30
    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME NOT IN (
                                /*
                                'Developer Indie App', 'Partner App', 'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )
                                */
                                'Risk Manager', 'Savings', 'Square Messages',
                                'Strategic Partner Integration', 'Team Management', 
                                            'R12', 'S1', 'R4', 'R41', 'R6', 'S3', 'S3 Mount', 'T2', 'X2'
                                )

  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Days to IDV Completion (7-Day) (Of Sellers Who Complete IDV)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP
  ,MIN(t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE - t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS VALUE
  
FROM APP_ONBOARDING.PRODUCT_INTENT.PRODUCT_INTENT_MERCHANT_FACTS t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.BEST_AVAILABLE_MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.ACTIVATION_SUCCESS_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
  
GROUP BY ALL

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with Positive Adjusted Revenue Amount (Processing) (35-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.REPORT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS AR35
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY = 'Processing'
    AND t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL

HAVING AR35 > 0

metrics.name: Proportion of Sellers with Positive Adjusted Revenue Amount (Subscription) (35-Day)

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(t1.REPORT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  ,SUM(t1.ADJUSTED_REVENUE_FXD_USD) AS AR35
  
FROM APP_BI.HEXAGON.VAGG_DAILY_REVENUE_SUMMARY t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE 
    t1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY = 'SaaS'
    AND t1.REPORT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 35

GROUP BY ALL

HAVING AR35 > 0

select

  ,MIN(t1.EVENT_TS) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2

WHERE 
    t1.EVENT_TYPE = 'top_of_funnel'

    AND t1.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE AND t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE + 7
  
GROUP BY ALL

select

  ,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP
  
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_TOF_BOF t1

INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 

WHERE

    AND t1.PRODUCT_NAME IN ('R12', 'R4', 'S3', 'R6', 'X2', 'T3', 'R41', 'T2', 'R42', 'S3 Mount', 'S1')

with cte as (
select avt, u_recorded_at as timestamp,
1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage_path = '/us/en'
and u_recorded_at between '{{startDate}}' and '{{endDate}}'
and next_page like '%/signup%'
)
select avt, timestamp, value
from cte

with cte as (
select avt, u_recorded_at as timestamp,
1 as value
from app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview
where webpage_path = '/us/en'
and u_recorded_at between '{{startDate}}' and '{{endDate}}'
and next_page like '%/sales/contact%'
)
select avt, timestamp, value
from cte

WITH avt as (
    select distinct
    avt
    , best_available_merchant_token merchant_token
    from
    app_mktg_web.attribution.public_web_pageview 
    where 1=1
    and best_available_merchant_token IS NOT NULL
)
, mt as (
SELECT
  t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN AS MERCHANT_TOKEN
  ,MIN(event_ts) TIMESTAMP
  --,MIN(t2.USER_CREATED_AT_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP -- this can be used too because we do not have conversion window
FROM GROWTH_MKTG.PUBLIC.VCONVERSION_EVENTS_SQ_BOF t1
INNER JOIN APP_BI.HEXAGON.VDIM_USER t2
    ON  t2.MERCHANT_TOKEN = t1.MERCHANT_TOKEN
    AND t2.IS_MERCHANT = 1 
GROUP BY ALL
)

select
avt.avt
, mt.TIMESTAMP
from
avt left join mt
on avt.merchant_token = mt.merchant_token

SELECT
  merchant_token,
  dateadd(day, 1, report_date) as timestamp, -- account for timestamp delay
  volume_gross_fxd_usd as value
FROM
  app_bi.hexagon.vagg_daily_revenue_summary
 WHERE product_category = 'Processing'

WITH
  new_items as (
    select
      entity_id merchant_token,
      timestamp
    from
      CUSTOMER_DATA.SQUARE_MOBILE.MERCHANT_ITEMS__QUICK_CREATE__ITEM_SAVED
    where
      timestamp >= '2025-10-01'
  ),
  items as (
    select
      subject_merchant_token as merchant_token,
      u_recorded_at as timestamp
    FROM
      eventstream2.catalogs.catalog_feature_interaction item
    where
      u_recorded_date >= '2025-10-01'
      and catalog_feature_interaction_feature_name = 'Item Created'
      and subject_merchant_token IS NOT NULL
  ),
  final as (
    select
      merchant_token,
      timestamp,
      row_number() OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          merchant_token
        ORDER BY
          timestamp
      ) as item_num
    from
      (
        (
          select
            *
          from
            items
        )
        UNION ALL
        (
          select
            *
          from
            new_items
        )
      )
  )
select
  merchant_token,
  timestamp
from
  final
where
  item_num = 5

metrics.name: Suggested Replies Eligible to be Shown Messages

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT
  merchant_token,
  coalesce(shown_at, spoken_at) as timestamp,
  s.utterance_id as value
FROM
  app_messenger.public.merchant_messages mm 
 JOIN 
    (
    SELECT utterance_id, 
            is_suggestion, 
            was_shown, 
            shown_at, 
            was_accepted
    FROM MESSENGER.SQUAREWAVE.SUGGESTED_REPLIES_SPINE
    WHERE was_eligible_to_show = True
    )  s
 on mm.utterance_id = s.utterance_id

metrics.name: [GTMI] 07d Any HW Purchase
metrics.description:
Any hardware purchase, including both web and retail channels, within 7d of experiment exposure

Sourced from app_hardware marketing ROIS table.  ** note because ROIS table only has purchase date timestamp, it's adjusted forward 1 day to avoid the timestamp falling behind the experiment exposure if on same day

sql.conversionSQL:
SELECT MERCHANT_TOKEN
     -- hw purchase date is date only (so technically prior midnight)
     -- therefore use next bd to avoid timestamp falling before web visit
     , DATEADD('day', 1, BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  
FROM APP_HARDWARE.ADHOC.HARDWARE_SALES_FOR_MARKETING_ROIS
WHERE TRUE 
  AND BEST_AVAILABLE_PURCHASE_DATE BETWEEN '{{ startDate }}' AND '{{ endDate }}'
